        "contents": "# Documentation Organization &amp; Hierarchy\n\n**Purpose**: Overview of documentation structure, hierarchy, and coherence\n\n---\n\n## Complete Structure\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\ndocs/\n├── README.md                    # Main documentation overview\n│\n├── 01-core/                    # Core product documentation (references)\n│   └── README.md               # Reference guide to main docs\n│\n├── 02-mobile/                  # Mobile-specific documentation ONLY\n│   ├── README.md               # Mobile docs overview\n│   ├── 01-technology-stack.md  # Mobile tech stack &amp; decisions\n│   ├── 02-architecture.md      # Mobile architecture\n│   └── 03-implementation.md    # Mobile implementation guide\n│\n├── 03-platforms/               # Multi-platform strategy &amp; optimization\n│   ├── README.md               # Platform docs overview\n│   ├── 01-multi-platform-strategy.md  # Mobile + Web strategy\n│   └── 02-browser-optimization-strategy.md  # Chrome-first browser strategy\n│\n└── 04-reference/               # Reference guides\n    └── 01-showcase-access.md   # Component showcase (Web &amp; Mobile access)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n---\n\n## Hierarchy &amp; Coherence\n\n### 01-core/ - Core Product Docs\n**Purpose**: Reference to main product documentation  \n**Content**: Links and references to &#96;../../docs/internal/&#96;  \n**Scope**: Product constitution, scientific foundations, system architecture\n\n### 02-mobile/ - Mobile-Specific Docs\n**Purpose**: Mobile app development documentation  \n**Content**: Mobile-specific tech stack, architecture, implementation  \n**Scope**: React Native, Expo, mobile patterns, mobile optimizations  \n**Coherence**: ✅ Contains ONLY mobile-specific content\n\n### 03-platforms/ - Multi-Platform Strategy\n**Purpose**: Cross-platform development strategies  \n**Content**: Multi-platform strategy, browser optimization  \n**Scope**: Mobile + Web, parallel development, browser strategies  \n**Coherence**: ✅ Separated from mobile-specific docs",

        "contents": "- **Loading states** - show loading indicators during async operations\n- **Empty states** - beautiful empty states for all screens\n- **Performance optimized** - follow performance targets\n\n### 5. Multi-Platform Parallel Development\n- **Both platforms developed simultaneously** - Mobile and Web in parallel\n- **Shared codebase** - Business logic in &#96;packages/shared/&#96;\n- **Platform-specific UI** - UI components in each platform folder\n- **Test simultaneously** - Test both platforms together\n- **Consistency** - Ensure UI/UX consistency across platforms\n- **Web as Desktop** - Web app serves desktop users via browsers (PWA support)\n\n### 6. Mobile-First Design (Mobile Platform)\n- **Optimize for mobile screens** - not desktop\n- **Touch-friendly** - proper touch targets (44x44pt minimum)\n- **Background audio** - support background playback\n- **Offline support** - cache data for offline access\n- **Native feel** - use native components and patterns\n\n### 7. Web-Optimized for Desktop Browsers (Web Platform)\n- **Keyboard shortcuts** - Full keyboard navigation\n- **PWA support** - Installable as desktop app\n- **Responsive design** - Optimized for desktop screen sizes\n- **Performance** - &lt; 2s first load, &gt; 95 Lighthouse score\n- **Chrome-first** - Optimize for Chrome (~80% market share)\n\n### 8. Web-Optimized Design (Web Platform)\n- **Chrome-first** - Optimize for Chrome (~80% market share)\n- **PWA support** - Installable, offline support\n- **SEO** - Content discoverable\n- **Performance** - &lt; 2s first load, &gt; 95 Lighthouse score\n\n---\n\n## Documentation Structure (Hierarchical &amp; Numbered)\n\n### Complete Documentation Reference\n\n**IMPORTANT**: Always use Context7 to query documentation when needed. Reference ALL docs below.\n\n#### 1. Core Product Docs (&#96;../../docs/internal/&#96;)\n**Location**: &#96;../../docs/internal/&#96; (main waQup project - use Context7 to query)\n\n**Core Documents (01-07)**:\n- &#96;01-product-constitution.md&#96; - Core identity, principles, boundaries, invariants\n- &#96;02-scientific-foundations.md&#96; - Scientific backing, neuroplasticity, subconscious mind\n- &#96;03-conversational-system.md&#96; - Conversation flows, content types, state machine",

        "contents": "**Tracking** (&#96;03-tracking/&#96;):\n- &#96;01-changelog.md&#96; - Step completion tracking, updates, status\n- &#96;02-analysis-template.md&#96; - Template for creating phase analysis documents\n- &#96;03-step-tracking.md&#96; - Template for tracking individual steps\n\n### Using Context7 for Documentation\n\n**ALWAYS use Context7 when you need documentation information:**\n\n1. **For Product Understanding**:\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n   Use Context7 to query: \"What are the three content types in waQup and how do they differ?\"\n   Reference: ../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n2. **For Scientific Backing**:\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n   Use Context7 to query: \"What is the scientific foundation for voice-first design?\"\n   Reference: ../../docs/internal/02-scientific-foundations.md\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n3. **For Technical Architecture**:\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n   Use Context7 to query: \"How does the conversation system work?\"\n   Reference: ../../docs/internal/03-conversational-system.md\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n4. **For Database Schema**:\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n   Use Context7 to query: \"What is the database schema for content items?\"\n   Reference: ../../docs/internal/database.md\n   OR\n   Reference: rebuild-roadmap/01-planning/02-schema-verification.md\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n5. **For Audio Generation**:\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n   Use Context7 to query: \"How does ElevenLabs voice cloning work?\"\n   Reference: ../../docs/internal/audio-generation.md\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n6. **For Technology Stack**:\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n   Use Context7 to query: \"What is the finalized tech stack for mobile?\"\n   Reference: docs/02-mobile/01-technology-stack.md\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n7. **For Implementation Details**:\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n   Use Context7 to query: \"What are the implementation patterns for React Native?\"\n   Reference: docs/02-mobile/03-implementation.md\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n8. **For Architecture**:\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n   Use Context7 to query: \"What is the mobile app architecture?\"\n   Reference: docs/02-mobile/02-architecture.md\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**Context7 Usage Pattern**:\n- **Before implementing**: Query relevant docs using Context7\n- **When stuck**: Use Context7 to find answers in docs\n- **When verifying**: Use Context7 to check requirements\n- **When documenting**: Use Context7 to reference existing patterns",

        "contents": "# waQup Mobile App Documentation\n\n**Purpose**: Essential documentation for mobile app rebuild\n\n---\n\n## Documentation Structure\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\ndocs/\n├── README.md                    # This file\n│\n├── 01-core/                    # Core product documentation (references)\n│   └── README.md               # Reference guide to main docs\n│\n├── 02-mobile/                  # Mobile-specific documentation\n│   ├── 01-technology-stack.md  # Tech decisions &amp; stack (mobile)\n│   ├── 02-architecture.md      # Mobile architecture\n│   └── 03-implementation.md    # Implementation guide (mobile)\n│\n├── 03-platforms/               # Multi-platform strategy &amp; optimization\n│   ├── README.md               # Platform docs overview\n│   ├── 01-multi-platform-strategy.md  # Mobile, Desktop, Web strategy\n│   └── 02-browser-optimization-strategy.md  # Chrome-first browser strategy\n│\n└── 04-reference/               # Reference guides\n    └── 01-showcase-access.md   # Component showcase (Web &amp; Mobile access)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n---\n\n## Quick Navigation\n\n### 📱 Mobile Documentation (&#96;02-mobile/&#96;)\n- **[01 Technology Stack](./02-mobile/01-technology-stack.md)** - Mobile tech decisions &amp; stack\n- **[02 Architecture](./02-mobile/02-architecture.md)** - Mobile app architecture\n- **[03 Implementation](./02-mobile/03-implementation.md)** - Mobile implementation guide\n\n### 🌐 Platform Documentation (&#96;03-platforms/&#96;)\n- **[01 Multi-Platform Strategy](./03-platforms/01-multi-platform-strategy.md)** - Mobile + Web strategy\n- **[02 Browser Optimization Strategy](./03-platforms/02-browser-optimization-strategy.md)** - Chrome-first browser strategy\n\n### 📚 Reference Guides (&#96;04-reference/&#96;)\n- **[01 Showcase Access](./04-reference/01-showcase-access.md)** - Component showcase (Web URL &amp; Mobile deep links)\n\n### 🔗 Core Product Docs (&#96;01-core/&#96;)\n- See [01-core/README.md](./01-core/README.md) for reference to main product docs\n\n---\n\n## How to Use\n\n1. **For Mobile Development**: \n   ",

        "range": {

        "contents": "- **Status**: ✅ Complete (or ⏳ Pending)\n- **Completed**: YYYY-MM-DD\n- **Notes**: What was done\n- **Updated**: YYYY-MM-DD\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n---\n\n## File Naming Conventions\n\n### Components\n- **PascalCase**: &#96;Button.tsx&#96;, &#96;AudioPlayer.tsx&#96;\n- **Screens**: &#96;*Screen.tsx&#96; suffix\n- **Hooks**: &#96;use*&#96; prefix\n\n### Files\n- **kebab-case**: &#96;audio-service.ts&#96;, &#96;content-api.ts&#96;\n- **Types**: &#96;*.types.ts&#96; or in &#96;types/&#96; folder\n- **Numbered docs**: &#96;01-name.md&#96;, &#96;02-name.md&#96; (for ordered docs)\n\n### Folders\n- **kebab-case**: &#96;api-services/&#96;\n- **Numbered**: &#96;01-core/&#96;, &#96;02-mobile/&#96; (for ordered folders)\n\n---\n\n## Git Workflow\n\n### Commits\n- **Descriptive messages** - what and why\n- **Reference steps** - mention step number\n- **Update changelog** - in same commit\n\n### Branches\n- **main** - production-ready code\n- **feature/*** - new features\n- **fix/*** - bug fixes\n\n---\n\n## Important Files to Always Check\n\n### Primary (This Project)\n1. **Changelog**: &#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&#96; - step status\n2. **Roadmap**: &#96;rebuild-roadmap/01-planning/01-roadmap.md&#96; - overall plan\n3. **Schema**: &#96;rebuild-roadmap/01-planning/02-schema-verification.md&#96; - database\n4. **Tech Stack**: &#96;docs/02-mobile/01-technology-stack.md&#96; - finalized decisions\n5. **Architecture**: &#96;docs/02-mobile/02-architecture.md&#96; - system structure\n6. **Implementation**: &#96;docs/02-mobile/03-implementation.md&#96; - patterns &amp; guide\n7. **Context7 Guide**: &#96;docs/04-reference/01-context7-usage.md&#96; - Context7 usage\n8. **Cursor Rules Guide**: &#96;docs/04-reference/02-cursor-rules-guide.md&#96; - Rules guide\n9. **Multi-Platform Strategy**: &#96;docs/03-platforms/01-multi-platform-strategy.md&#96; - Platform strategy\n10. **Browser Optimization**: &#96;docs/03-platforms/02-browser-optimization-strategy.md&#96; - Browser strategy\n\n### Reference (Main Project - Use Context7)\n9. **Product Constitution**: &#96;../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md&#96; - Core principles\n10. **Scientific Foundations**: &#96;../../docs/internal/02-scientific-foundations.md&#96; - Research backing\n11. **System Architecture**: &#96;../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md&#96; - Full architecture",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.cursorrules",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 42
          }
        },
        "contents": "# waQup Mobile App - Cursor Rules\n\n## Project Context\n\nThis is the **waQup multi-platform rebuild** - building Mobile (React Native + Expo for Android/iOS) and Web (Next.js for desktop browsers) apps **simultaneously from scratch**. This is the **main development repository** for the new waQup platform.\n\n**Location**: &#96;waqup-app/waqup-new/&#96; (this is the active development repo)\n**Strategy**: **Parallel Development** - Mobile and Web platforms developed simultaneously\n**Tech Stack**: \n- **Mobile**: React Native + Expo SDK 54 + TypeScript 5.9.3 (Android + iOS)\n- **Web**: Next.js 16.1.6 + TypeScript 5.9.3 (Desktop browsers - Chrome-first)\n- **Shared**: Supabase backend (same as web app)\n**Goal**: Production-ready apps for iOS, Android, and Web browsers (Chrome-first, PWA support)\n\n---\n\n## Core Principles\n\n### 1. Step-by-Step Verification\n- **Each step must be independently testable**\n- **Clear UI checkpoints at each step** - visible progress\n- **Update changelog** (&#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&#96;) when completing steps\n- **If re-running a step, update changelog with new entry**\n\n### 2. Now/After Analysis\n- **Always document current state (NOW)** before changes\n- **Always document target state (AFTER)** after changes\n- **Use phase analysis documents** (&#96;rebuild-roadmap/02-phases/&#96;) for detailed analysis\n- **Keep schemas coherent** - verify database schemas at each phase\n\n### 3. Documentation First\n- **Base all work on existing docs** in &#96;../../docs/&#96; and &#96;docs/&#96;\n- **Use Context7 to query docs** - fastest and most accurate\n- **Reference scientific foundations** from &#96;../../docs/internal/02-scientific-foundations.md&#96;\n- **Follow product constitution** from &#96;../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md&#96;\n- **Update docs as you go** - keep documentation in sync with code\n\n### 4. Production Quality\n- **Not prototypes** - everything must be production-ready\n- **Proper error handling** - graceful error states everywhere\n- **Loading states** - show loading indicators during async operations\n- **Empty states** - beautiful empty states for all screens",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# waQup Mobile App - Cursor Rules",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "## Project Context",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "This is the **waQup multi-platform rebuild** - building Mobile (React Native + Expo for Android/iOS) and Web (Next.js for desktop browsers) apps **simultaneously from scratch**. This is the **main development repository** for the new waQup platform.",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "**Location**: &#96;waqup-app/waqup-new/&#96; (this is the active development repo)",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "**Strategy**: **Parallel Development** - Mobile and Web platforms developed simultaneously",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "**Tech Stack**: ",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Mobile**: React Native + Expo SDK 54 + TypeScript 5.9.3 (Android + iOS)",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Web**: Next.js 16.1.6 + TypeScript 5.9.3 (Desktop browsers - Chrome-first)",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Shared**: Supabase backend (same as web app)",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "**Goal**: Production-ready apps for iOS, Android, and Web browsers (Chrome-first, PWA support)",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "## Core Principles",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "### 1. Step-by-Step Verification",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Each step must be independently testable**",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Clear UI checkpoints at each step** - visible progress",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Update changelog** (&#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&#96;) when completing steps",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "- **If re-running a step, update changelog with new entry**",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2. Now/After Analysis",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Always document current state (NOW)** before changes",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Always document target state (AFTER)** after changes",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Use phase analysis documents** (&#96;rebuild-roadmap/02-phases/&#96;) for detailed analysis",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Keep schemas coherent** - verify database schemas at each phase",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "### 3. Documentation First",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Base all work on existing docs** in &#96;../../docs/&#96; and &#96;docs/&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Use Context7 to query docs** - fastest and most accurate",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Reference scientific foundations** from &#96;../../docs/internal/02-scientific-foundations.md&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Follow product constitution** from &#96;../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Update docs as you go** - keep documentation in sync with code",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "### 4. Production Quality",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Not prototypes** - everything must be production-ready",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Proper error handling** - graceful error states everywhere",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Loading states** - show loading indicators during async operations",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Empty states** - beautiful empty states for all screens",
            "lineNumber": 42
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3606458902359009
    },

        "contents": "**Coherence**: ✅ Separated from mobile-specific docs\n\n### 04-reference/ - Reference Guides\n**Purpose**: Reference documentation (SSOT)  \n**Content**: Showcase access (Web URL, Mobile deep links)  \n**Scope**: Development and testing reference\n\n---\n\n## Numbering Convention\n\n- **Folders**: &#96;01-&#96;, &#96;02-&#96;, &#96;03-&#96;, &#96;04-&#96; prefix (sequential, hierarchical)\n- **Files**: &#96;01-&#96;, &#96;02-&#96;, &#96;03-&#96; prefix within folders (sequential)\n- **Consistent**: All numbered items follow this pattern\n\n---\n\n## Coherence Rules\n\n### ✅ Mobile Docs (&#96;02-mobile/&#96;)\n- **Contains**: Mobile-specific content ONLY\n- **Does NOT contain**: Multi-platform strategies, browser strategies\n- **References**: Links to &#96;03-platforms/&#96; for cross-platform info\n\n### ✅ Platform Docs (&#96;03-platforms/&#96;)\n- **Contains**: Cross-platform strategies, browser optimization\n- **References**: Links to &#96;02-mobile/&#96; for mobile-specific details\n- **Scope**: Both platforms (Mobile + Web)\n\n### ✅ Clear Separation\n- Mobile-specific → &#96;02-mobile/&#96;\n- Cross-platform → &#96;03-platforms/&#96;\n- References → &#96;04-reference/&#96;\n- Core product → &#96;01-core/&#96;\n\n---\n\n## Navigation Flow\n\n### For Mobile Development\n1. Start: &#96;02-mobile/README.md&#96;\n2. Tech Stack: &#96;02-mobile/01-technology-stack.md&#96;\n3. Architecture: &#96;02-mobile/02-architecture.md&#96;\n4.     {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./rebuild-roadmap/01-planning/01-roadmap.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 34
          }
        },
        "contents": "# waQup Production Rebuild Roadmap\n\n**Goal**: Rebuild waQup from scratch as a production-ready mobile app for iOS and Android app stores, with high-quality design, fast performance, and scientific backing.\n\n**Approach**: Each step is independently runnable with clear, visible UI differences. We build incrementally, testing at each stage.\n\n**Important**: For detailed analysis of each phase with \"now/after\" comparisons, schema verification, and step-by-step implementation details, see:\n- [Schema Verification](./02-schema-verification.md) - Complete database schema analysis\n- [Phase Analyses](../02-phases/) - Detailed analysis for each phase\n- [Changelog](../03-tracking/01-changelog.md) - **Track step completion and updates**\n- [Analysis Template](../03-tracking/02-analysis-template.md) - Template for phase analysis\n- [Step Tracking Template](../03-tracking/03-step-tracking.md) - Template for tracking individual steps\n- [Technology Stack](../../docs/02-mobile/01-technology-stack.md) - Finalized tech stack\n- [Architecture](../../docs/02-mobile/02-architecture.md) - Mobile architecture\n- [Implementation](../../docs/02-mobile/03-implementation.md) - Implementation guide\n\n**⚠️ IMPORTANT**: Always update [Changelog](../03-tracking/01-changelog.md) when completing or re-running steps!\n\n---\n\n## Table of Contents\n\n1. [Phase 0: Research &amp; Planning](#phase-0-research--planning)\n2. [Phase 1: Project Foundation](#phase-1-project-foundation)\n3. [Phase 2: Design System &amp; UI Foundation](#phase-2-design-system--ui-foundation)\n4. [Phase 3: Authentication System](#phase-3-authentication-system)\n5. [Phase 4: Core Pages Structure](#phase-4-core-pages-structure)\n6. [Phase 5: Content Definitions &amp; Types](#phase-5-content-definitions--types)\n7. [Phase 6: Error Handling &amp; Validation](#phase-6-error-handling--validation)\n8. [Phase 7: API Integration](#phase-7-api-integration)\n9. [Phase 8: Audio System](#phase-8-audio-system)\n10. [Phase 9: AI Integration](#phase-9-ai-integration)\n11. [Phase 10: Payment &amp; Credits](#phase-10-payment--credits)\n12. [Phase 11: Performance Optimization](#phase-11-performance-optimization)",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# waQup Production Rebuild Roadmap",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "**Goal**: Rebuild waQup from scratch as a production-ready mobile app for iOS and Android app stores, with high-quality design, fast performance, and scientific backing.",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "**Approach**: Each step is independently runnable with clear, visible UI differences. We build incrementally, testing at each stage.",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "**Important**: For detailed analysis of each phase with \"now/after\" comparisons, schema verification, and step-by-step implementation details, see:",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "- [Schema Verification](./02-schema-verification.md) - Complete database schema analysis",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "- [Phase Analyses](../02-phases/) - Detailed analysis for each phase",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "- [Changelog](../03-tracking/01-changelog.md) - **Track step completion and updates**",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "- [Analysis Template](../03-tracking/02-analysis-template.md) - Template for phase analysis",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "- [Step Tracking Template](../03-tracking/03-step-tracking.md) - Template for tracking individual steps",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "- [Technology Stack](../../docs/02-mobile/01-technology-stack.md) - Finalized tech stack",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "- [Architecture](../../docs/02-mobile/02-architecture.md) - Mobile architecture",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "- [Implementation](../../docs/02-mobile/03-implementation.md) - Implementation guide",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "**⚠️ IMPORTANT**: Always update [Changelog](../03-tracking/01-changelog.md) when completing or re-running steps!",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "---",

        "contents": "**Location**: &#96;docs/03-platforms/&#96; (this project)\n\n- &#96;README.md&#96; - Platform documentation overview\n- &#96;01-multi-platform-strategy.md&#96; - Multi-platform strategy (Mobile + Web), platform differences, Revolut-level quality standards, parallel development\n- &#96;02-browser-optimization-strategy.md&#96; - Chrome-first browser optimization strategy, browser-specific features, expansion plan\n\n#### 4. Reference Guides (&#96;docs/04-reference/&#96;)\n**Location**: &#96;docs/04-reference/&#96; (this project)\n\n- &#96;01-context7-usage.md&#96; - How to use Context7 for documentation queries\n- &#96;02-cursor-rules-guide.md&#96; - Cursor rules explained and how to use them\n\n#### 5. Roadmap &amp; Planning (&#96;rebuild-roadmap/&#96;)\n**Location**: &#96;rebuild-roadmap/&#96; (this project)\n\n**Planning** (&#96;01-planning/&#96;):\n- &#96;01-roadmap.md&#96; - Main roadmap (13 phases, 50+ steps), success criteria, UI checkpoints\n- &#96;02-schema-verification.md&#96; - Database schema analysis, missing tables, migrations, coherence checklist\n\n**Phase Analyses** (&#96;02-phases/&#96;):\n- &#96;00-phase-00-research-planning.md&#96; - Research phase (complete)\n- &#96;01-phase-01-project-foundation.md&#96; - Detailed Phase 1 analysis with NOW/AFTER comparison\n- &#96;02-phase-02-design-system-ui-foundation.md&#96; - Design system with quality testing\n- &#96;03-phase-03-authentication-system.md&#96; - Authentication implementation\n- &#96;04-phase-04-core-pages-structure.md&#96; - Core pages structure\n- &#96;05-phase-05-content-definitions-types.md&#96; - Content types and definitions\n- &#96;06-phase-06-error-handling-validation.md&#96; - Error handling and validation\n- &#96;07-phase-07-api-integration.md&#96; - API integration\n- &#96;08-phase-08-audio-system.md&#96; - Audio system\n- &#96;09-phase-09-ai-integration.md&#96; - AI integration\n- &#96;10-phase-10-payment-credits.md&#96; - Payment and credits\n- &#96;11-phase-11-performance-optimization.md&#96; - Performance optimization\n- &#96;12-phase-12-testing-quality-assurance.md&#96; - Testing and QA\n- &#96;13-phase-13-app-store-preparation.md&#96; - App store preparation\n- &#96;14-phase-14-marketplace-platform.md&#96; - Marketplace platform (future)\n\n**Tracking** (&#96;03-tracking/&#96;):\n- &#96;01-changelog.md&#96; - Step completion tracking, updates, status",

        "contents": "# Platform Documentation\n\n**Purpose**: Multi-platform strategy and optimization guides for Mobile and Web platforms\n\n---\n\n## Structure\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n03-platforms/\n├── README.md                           # This file\n├── 01-multi-platform-strategy.md       # Mobile + Web strategy\n└── 02-browser-optimization-strategy.md # Chrome-first browser strategy\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n---\n\n## Quick Navigation\n\n### 📱 Multi-Platform Strategy\n- **[01 Multi-Platform Strategy](./01-multi-platform-strategy.md)** - Strategy for Mobile and Web platforms developed simultaneously\n\n### 🌐 Browser Optimization\n- **[02 Browser Optimization Strategy](./02-browser-optimization-strategy.md)** - Chrome-first browser optimization strategy\n\n---\n\n## Documentation Hierarchy\n\n### Mobile-Specific Docs\nSee &#96;../02-mobile/&#96; for:\n- Technology Stack (mobile)\n- Architecture (mobile)\n- Implementation (mobile)\n\n### Platform Strategy Docs\nThis folder (&#96;03-platforms/&#96;) contains:\n- Multi-platform development strategy (Mobile + Web)\n- Browser optimization strategy\n- Cross-platform considerations\n\n### Core Product Docs\nSee &#96;../01-core/&#96; for:\n- Reference to main product documentation\n\n---\n\n## How to Use\n\n1. **For Mobile Development**: See &#96;../02-mobile/&#96; (mobile-specific)\n2. **For Multi-Platform Strategy**: Read [01 Multi-Platform Strategy](./01-multi-platform-strategy.md)\n3. **For Browser Optimization**: Read [02 Browser Optimization Strategy](./02-browser-optimization-strategy.md)\n4. **For Product Context**: See &#96;../01-core/&#96; → &#96;../../docs/internal/&#96;\n\n---\n\n**Last Updated**: 2026-02-07",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/01-core/README.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {

          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 92
          }
        },
        "contents": "## Using Context7\n\n**Recommended**: Use Context7 to query these docs\n\n**Example**:\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nContext7 Query: \"What are the three content types in waQup?\"\nReference: ../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nSee &#96;../03-reference/01-context7-usage.md&#96; for detailed guide.\n\n---\n\n**Purpose**: Reference only - main docs stay in &#96;../../docs/internal/&#96;",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "## Using Context7",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "**Recommended**: Use Context7 to query these docs",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "**Example**:",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "Context7 Query: \"What are the three content types in waQup?\"",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "Reference: ../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "See &#96;../03-reference/01-context7-usage.md&#96; for detailed guide.",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "**Purpose**: Reference only - main docs stay in &#96;../../docs/internal/&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 92

        ]

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.cursorrules",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 929
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 982
          }
        },
        "contents": "2. **Implement on both platforms** - Mobile and Web simultaneously\n3. **Test frequently** - after each change on both platforms\n4. **Update changelog** - mark progress\n5. **Document decisions** - note why choices were made\n6. **Keep schemas coherent** - verify at each step\n7. **Ensure consistency** - UI/UX consistent across platforms\n\n### After Completing a Step\n\n1. **Verify UI checkpoint** - see visible progress on both platforms\n2. **Test functionality** - ensure it works on Mobile and Web\n3. **Verify consistency** - UI/UX consistent across platforms\n4. **Update changelog** - mark complete with date in &#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&#96;\n5. **Update docs** - if needed\n6. **Commit changes** - with descriptive message\n\n### When Re-Running a Step\n\n1. **Check changelog** - see what was done before in &#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&#96;\n2. **Update changelog** - add new entry with date\n3. **Note changes** - what was updated\n4. **Keep history** - don't delete previous entries\n5. **Test all platforms** - ensure changes work on all platforms\n\n---\n\n## Key Requirements\n\n### Voice-First Design\n- **Audio is primary** - text/visual are secondary\n- **Background audio** - support background playback\n- **Handle interruptions** - calls, notifications\n- **Voice recording** - high-quality capture\n\n### Three Content Types (NOT Interchangeable)\n- **Affirmations** - Cognitive re-patterning (shallow → medium)\n- **Guided Meditations** - State induction (medium)\n- **Rituals** - Identity encoding (deepest)\n\n**Reference**: Use Context7 to query &#96;../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md&#96;\n\n### Conversation Over Forms\n- **No static forms** - all creation through dialogue\n- **Chat-like interface** - conversational UI\n- **Context-aware** - adapts based on responses\n- **State machine** - manage conversation flow\n\n### Practice is Free\n- **Unlimited replay** - no credit consumption for playback\n- **Credits for creation** - only creation costs credits\n- **No subscription pressure** - user autonomy\n\n### User Autonomy",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "2. **Implement on both platforms** - Mobile and Web simultaneously",
            "lineNumber": 930
          },
          {
            "text": "3. **Test frequently** - after each change on both platforms",

            "lineNumber": 941

            "lineNumber": 942

            "lineNumber": 946
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 947
          },
          {

          {

          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./rebuild-roadmap/README.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 56
          }
        },
        "contents": "# waQup Mobile App Rebuild - Roadmap &amp; Planning\n\n**Purpose**: Complete roadmap and planning for mobile app rebuild\n\n---\n\n## 📋 Table of Contents\n\n1. [Structure](#structure)\n2. [Quick Navigation](#quick-navigation)\n3. [Development Setup](#development-setup)\n   - [Quick Start (Automated Setup)](#-quick-start-automated-setup)\n   - [Prerequisites](#prerequisites)\n   - [Local Development (Manual Setup)](#local-development-manual-setup)\n     - [Windows](#local-development-windows)\n     - [Linux/macOS](#local-development-linuxmacos)\n4. [Development Pipeline](#development-pipeline)\n5. [Production Pipeline](#production-pipeline)\n6. [How to Use](#how-to-use)\n7.       "codeBlock": {

        "contents": "## 💻 Cross-Platform Support\n\n✅ **Windows**: Fully supported  \n✅ **macOS**: Fully supported  \n✅ **Linux**: Fully supported  \n\nAll commands work identically across platforms.\n\n---\n\n## 📁 Project Structure\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nwaqup-new/\n├── packages/\n│   ├── mobile/          # React Native + Expo (iOS + Android)\n│   ├── web/             # Next.js (Desktop browsers)\n│   └── shared/          # Shared business logic\n├── docs/                # Documentation\n├── rebuild-roadmap/     # Development roadmap\n└── package.json         # Root workspace config\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Web design system (packages/web)\n\n- **Shared layout**: &#96;AppHeader&#96; (public / authenticated / simplified), &#96;PageShell&#96; (background + gradient + content container), &#96;GlassCard&#96; (auth/content variants)\n- **Design tokens**: &#96;packages/web/src/theme/design-tokens.ts&#96; (CONTENT_MAX_WIDTH, spacing, glass card styles)\n- **Layouts**: Auth (no header), Main/Sanctuary (authenticated header), Marketing (public header), Onboarding (simplified header)\n- **Reference**: [docs/04-reference/03-web-app-structure.md](./docs/04-reference/03-web-app-structure.md)\n\n---\n\n## 🏃 Development\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\n# Install dependencies\nnpm install\n\n# Run mobile (Expo)\nnpm run dev:mobile\n\n# Run web (Next.js)\nnpm run dev:web\n\n# Run both simultaneously\nnpm run dev:all\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n---\n\n## 📚 Documentation\n\n- **[START_HERE.md](./START_HERE.md)** - Getting started guide\n- **[docs/](./docs/)** - Complete documentation\n- **[rebuild-roadmap/](./rebuild-roadmap/)** - Development roadmap\n\n---\n\n## 🔗 Related Repositories\n\n- **This Repository**: [waqup-new](https://github.com/InnerFlect-Tech/waqup-new) - Multi-platform rebuild (Mobile + Web)\n- **Main Project**: &#96;waqup-app/&#96; (parent directory) - Original project\n\n---\n\n## ✅ Status\n\n- ✅ Project structure initialized\n- ✅ Mobile + Web platforms configured\n- ✅ Shared package set up\n- ✅ Documentation complete\n- ✅ Cross-platform compatible\n- ✅ Web design consistency: AppHeader, PageShell, GlassCard, design tokens; all pages aligned\n- ⏳ Ready for Phase 1 development\n\n---\n\n---\n\n## 📝 License",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "## 💻 Cross-Platform Support",
            "lineNumber": 188
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 189
          },
          {
            "text": "✅ **Windows**: Fully supported  ",
            "lineNumber": 190
          },
          {
            "text": "✅ **macOS**: Fully supported  ",
            "lineNumber": 191
          },
          {
            "text": "✅ **Linux**: Fully supported  ",
            "lineNumber": 192
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193
          },
          {
            "text": "All commands work identically across platforms.",
            "lineNumber": 194
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 196
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 199
          },

            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "text": "waqup-new/",
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "text": "├── packages/",
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "text": "│   ├── mobile/          # React Native + Expo (iOS + Android)",
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "text": "│   ├── web/             # Next.js (Desktop browsers)",
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "text": "│   └── shared/          # Shared business logic",
            "lineNumber": 205
          },
          {
            "text": "├── docs/                # Documentation",
            "lineNumber": 206

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 208
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 210
          },
          {
            "text": "### Web design system (packages/web)",
            "lineNumber": 211
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 212
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Shared layout**: &#96;AppHeader&#96; (public / authenticated / simplified), &#96;PageShell&#96; (background + gradient + content container), &#96;GlassCard&#96; (auth/content variants)",
            "lineNumber": 213
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Design tokens**: &#96;packages/web/src/theme/design-tokens.ts&#96; (CONTENT_MAX_WIDTH, spacing, glass card styles)",
            "lineNumber": 214
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Layouts**: Auth (no header), Main/Sanctuary (authenticated header), Marketing (public header), Onboarding (simplified header)",
            "lineNumber": 215
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Reference**: [docs/04-reference/03-web-app-structure.md](./docs/04-reference/03-web-app-structure.md)",

          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;bash",
            "lineNumber": 222
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 223

          {

        "contents": "# Phase 0: Research &amp; Planning - Detailed Analysis\n\n## Overview\n**Goal**: Validate technology choices, gather best practices, and establish scientific foundations for the mobile app rebuild\n**Status**: ✅ Complete → Ready for Phase 1\n**Dependencies**: None (starting point)\n\n## Changelog\n\n### 2026-02-07 - Initial Analysis Created\n- **Status**: 📝 Analysis Complete\n- **Notes**: Research phase completed, technology stack finalized, documentation created\n- **Next**: Begin Phase 1 (Project Foundation)\n\n---\n\n## Current State Analysis (NOW)\n\n### Current Implementation\n**Location**: Documentation and research phase (no code yet)\n\n**What Exists**:\n- ✅ Technology stack research completed\n- ✅ Scientific foundations documented\n- ✅ App store requirements reviewed\n- ✅ Architecture decisions made\n- ✅ Implementation patterns researched\n\n**Current Documentation**:\n- &#96;docs/02-mobile/01-technology-stack.md&#96; - Finalized tech stack\n- &#96;docs/02-mobile/02-architecture.md&#96; - Mobile architecture\n- &#96;docs/02-mobile/03-implementation.md&#96; - Implementation guide\n- &#96;docs/01-core/README.md&#96; - Reference to core product docs\n- &#96;../../docs/internal/&#96; - Complete product documentation\n\n**Current Research Findings**:\n- React Native + Expo chosen for cross-platform development\n- Supabase React Native SDK validated\n- OpenAI TTS API integration patterns researched\n- Stripe React Native SDK reviewed\n- Scientific foundations (neuroplasticity, procedural memory) documented\n- App Store and Play Store requirements reviewed\n- Audio playback best practices researched\n\n**Current Limitations**:\n1. No code implementation yet\n2. No project structure created\n3. No dependencies installed\n\n---\n\n## Target State (AFTER)\n\n### Target Implementation\n**New Location**: &#96;waqup-new/&#96; (new mobile app project)\n\n**What Will Exist**:\n- ✅ Complete research documentation\n- ✅ Technology decisions finalized\n- ✅ Architecture defined\n- ✅ Implementation patterns documented\n- ✅ Ready to begin Phase 1\n\n**Target Documentation**:\n- All research findings documented",
        "signatures": {},

            "text": "- ✅ Ready to begin Phase 1",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63
          },

            "lineNumber": 64

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/02-mobile/02-architecture.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 100
          }
        },
        "contents": "# Architecture - waQup Mobile App\n\n**Status**: ✅ Defined | **Last Updated**: 2026-02-07\n\n## Overview\n\nMobile app architecture optimized for React Native + Expo, sharing Supabase backend with web app.\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nMobile App (React Native)\n    ↓\nSupabase Backend (PostgreSQL, Auth, Storage, Realtime)\n    ↓\nExternal Services (ElevenLabs, OpenAI, Stripe)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n---\n\n## App Layers\n\n### 1. Presentation Layer\n**Screens** (&#96;src/screens/&#96;):\n- Auth (Login, Signup, ForgotPassword)\n- Main (Home, Library, Create, Profile)\n- Content (Detail screens, Creation flows)\n\n**Components** (&#96;src/components/&#96;):\n- UI primitives (Button, Input, Card)\n- Features (AudioPlayer, ContentCard)\n- Layouts (Header, TabBar)\n\n### 2. State Management\n**Global State** (Zustand - &#96;src/stores/&#96;):\n- Auth store (user, session)\n- UI store (modals, loading)\n- Preferences store\n\n**Server State** (React Query - &#96;src/hooks/&#96;):\n- Content queries\n- User profile\n- Practice sessions\n- Real-time subscriptions\n\n### 3. Service Layer\n**API Services** (&#96;src/services/&#96;):\n- Supabase client\n- Content API\n- Audio API\n- Payment API\n- Auth API\n\n**Storage** (&#96;src/services/storage/&#96;):\n- Audio upload/download\n- File management\n\n### 4. Navigation Layer\n**Structure** (&#96;src/navigation/&#96;):\n- RootNavigator (Auth vs Main)\n- AuthNavigator (Stack)\n- MainNavigator (Bottom Tabs)\n- ContentNavigator (Stack)\n\n---\n\n## Data Flow\n\n### Content Creation\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nUser Input → Validation → Service → Supabase → External API → Process → Update State → UI\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Audio Playback\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nUser Taps Play → Audio Service → Load from Storage → Play → Track Progress → Record Session\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n---\n\n## Key Decisions\n\n### Offline-First\n- Cache content locally (React Query)\n- Store audio files locally\n- Queue actions when offline\n- Sync when online\n\n### Real-Time Updates\n- Supabase Realtime subscriptions\n- Update React Query cache automatically\n- Live UI updates\n\n### Audio Handling\n- Background audio support\n- Handle interruptions gracefully\n- Cache audio files locally\n- Stream from CDN\n\n### Performance\n- Lazy load screens\n- Optimize images",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.cursorrules",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 863
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 931
          }
        },
        "contents": "3. **Are types shared?** → Import from shared\n4. **Is error handling proper?** → Add error handling\n5. **Are loading states handled?** → Add loading states\n6. **Is this production-ready?** → Review against standards\n\n---\n\n## Quick Reference\n\n### ✅ DO\n- Put business logic in &#96;packages/shared/&#96;\n- Import types from shared\n- Use shared services for API calls\n- Use shared stores for state\n- Use shared schemas for validation\n- Follow consistent architecture\n- Test on all platforms\n- Update changelog\n\n### ❌ DON'T\n- Duplicate code across platforms\n- Create types in platform folders\n- Create API services in platform folders\n- Create stores in platform folders\n- Create validation schemas in platform folders\n- Skip error handling\n- Skip loading states\n- Skip empty states\n- Commit without testing\n\n---\n\n## Database &amp; Schema\n\n### Current Schema\n- **Same database as web app** - Supabase PostgreSQL\n- **Reference**: &#96;rebuild-roadmap/01-planning/02-schema-verification.md&#96;\n\n### Missing Tables (To Be Created)\n- &#96;content_items&#96; - Unified table for affirmations/meditations/rituals\n- &#96;credit_transactions&#96; - Credit system tracking\n- &#96;conversations&#96; - Conversational creation flow\n\n### Schema Changes\n- **Always verify schemas** - check coherence\n- **Create migrations** - for schema changes\n- **Update docs** - document schema changes\n- **Test RLS policies** - verify security\n\n---\n\n## Implementation Workflow\n\n### Before Starting a Step\n\n1. **Read phase analysis** - &#96;rebuild-roadmap/02-phases/01-phase-XX-*.md&#96;\n2. **Check changelog** - &#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&#96;\n3. **Use Context7** - query relevant documentation\n4. **Review docs** - understand requirements\n5. **Understand NOW state** - current implementation\n6. **Plan AFTER state** - target implementation\n7. **Check multi-platform strategy** - &#96;docs/03-platforms/01-multi-platform-strategy.md&#96;\n\n### During Implementation\n\n1. **Follow step-by-step** - don't skip steps\n2. **Implement on both platforms** - Mobile and Web simultaneously\n3. **Test frequently** - after each change on both platforms",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {

        "contents": "# Mobile-Specific Documentation\n\n**Purpose**: Mobile app development documentation (iOS &amp; Android)\n\n---\n\n## Structure\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n02-mobile/\n├── README.md                    # This file\n├── 01-technology-stack.md      # Mobile tech stack &amp; decisions\n├── 02-architecture.md          # Mobile app architecture\n├── 03-implementation.md        # Mobile implementation guide\n└── 04-android-sdk-requirements.md  # Android SDK requirements &amp; setup\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n---\n\n## Quick Navigation\n\n- **[01 Technology Stack](./01-technology-stack.md)** - Mobile tech decisions, packages, cost analysis\n- **[02 Architecture](./02-architecture.md)** - Mobile architecture, layers, data flow, structure\n- **[03 Implementation](./03-implementation.md)** - Mobile implementation patterns, gotchas, best practices\n- **[04 Android SDK Requirements](./04-android-sdk-requirements.md)** - Android SDK setup guide (optional for Expo Go)\n\n---\n\n## Related Documentation\n\n### Multi-Platform Strategy\nSee &#96;../03-platforms/&#96; for:\n- Multi-platform development strategy (Mobile + Web)\n- Browser optimization strategy\n\n### Core Product Docs\nSee &#96;../01-core/&#96; for:\n- Reference to main product documentation\n\n### Reference Guides\nSee &#96;../04-reference/&#96; for:\n- Context7 usage guide\n- Cursor rules guide\n\n---\n\n## Mobile-Specific Focus\n\nThis folder contains **mobile-specific** documentation:\n- React Native + Expo setup\n- Mobile navigation (React Navigation)\n- Mobile audio (expo-av)\n- Mobile-specific patterns and optimizations\n\nFor **cross-platform** or **multi-platform** strategies, see &#96;../03-platforms/&#96;.\n\n---\n\n**Last Updated**: 2026-02-07",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/02-mobile/02-architecture.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {

          "endPosition": {

        },
        "contents": "- Handle interruptions gracefully\n- Cache audio files locally\n- Stream from CDN\n\n### Performance\n- Lazy load screens\n- Optimize images\n- Code splitting\n- Memoization\n\n---\n\n## Integration Points\n\n### Supabase\n- **Database**: PostgreSQL queries\n- **Auth**: Supabase Auth v2 with PKCE\n- **Storage**: Audio file upload/download\n- **Realtime**: Live updates\n\n### External APIs\n- **ElevenLabs**: Voice cloning, TTS\n- **OpenAI**: Conversations, script generation\n- **Stripe**: Payments, subscriptions\n\n---\n\n## Security\n\n- Supabase Auth v2 with PKCE\n- Secure token storage (Keychain/Keystore)\n- HTTPS only\n- RLS policies\n- GDPR compliant\n\n---\n\n## Performance Targets\n\n- App launch: &lt; 2s\n- Screen transition: &lt; 300ms\n- API response: &lt; 500ms\n- Audio playback start: &lt; 1s\n- Bundle size: &lt; 50MB\n\n---\n\n## References\n\n- **Full Architecture**: See &#96;../../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md&#96;\n- **Implementation**: See [03-implementation.md](./03-implementation.md)\n- **Multi-Platform Strategy**: See &#96;../03-platforms/01-multi-platform-strategy.md&#96;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.cursorrules",

          "startPosition": {

        "contents": "- **When verifying**: Use Context7 to check requirements\n- **When documenting**: Use Context7 to reference existing patterns\n\n### Documentation Access Strategy\n\n1. **Primary**: Use Context7 to query docs (fastest, most accurate)\n2. **Secondary**: Read files directly if Context7 unavailable\n3. **Reference**: Use &#96;../../docs/internal/&#96; for full context\n4. **Mobile**: Use &#96;docs/02-mobile/&#96; for mobile-specific information\n\n### When Creating New Docs\n\n- **Use Context7 first** - query existing docs for patterns\n- **Reference existing docs** - adapt from &#96;../../docs/&#96;\n- **Follow numbering** - use numbered format (01-, 02-, etc.)\n- **Keep structure consistent** - follow existing patterns\n- **Update changelog** - document what was created\n- **Link from README** - add to appropriate README\n\n---\n\n## Technology Stack (Finalized)\n\n### Core\n- **Framework**: React Native + Expo SDK 54 (Mobile: Android + iOS)\n- **Language**: TypeScript (strict mode)\n- **Navigation**: React Navigation v6\n- **State**: Zustand (global) + React Query (server)\n- **Backend**: Supabase (same as web app)\n\n### Audio\n- **Playback**: expo-av\n- **TTS**: ElevenLabs (Professional Voice Cloning)\n- **Recording**: expo-av\n\n### AI\n- **Conversations**: OpenAI GPT-4o-mini (75% cost reduction)\n- **Scripts**: OpenAI GPT-4 (Batch API for 50% cost reduction)\n\n### Payments\n- **SDK**: Stripe React Native SDK\n- **Features**: Subscriptions, one-time payments, Apple Pay, Google Pay\n\n### Forms &amp; Validation\n- **Forms**: react-hook-form\n- **Validation**: zod + @hookform/resolvers\n\n### UI &amp; Animations\n- **Animations**: react-native-reanimated v3\n- **Gestures**: react-native-gesture-handler\n\n### Build &amp; Deploy\n- **Build**: Expo EAS Build\n- **Updates**: OTA updates (for JS changes)\n\n**Reference**: &#96;docs/02-mobile/01-technology-stack.md&#96; for details\n\n---\n\n## Project Structure (Monorepo)\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nwaqup-new/\n├── packages/\n│   ├── shared/              # Shared code (business logic)\n│   │   ├── src/\n│   │   │   ├── services/   # API services (Supabase)\n│   │   │   ├── stores/     # Zustand stores",
        "signatures": {},

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./rebuild-roadmap/02-phases/01-phase-01-project-foundation.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},

        "contents": "# Phase 1: Project Foundation - Detailed Analysis\n\n## Overview\n**Goal**: Set up clean, production-ready projects for Mobile (React Native + Expo for Android/iOS) and Web (Next.js for desktop browsers) simultaneously, configure all core dependencies, and establish connection to Supabase across both platforms\n**Status**: NOW → AFTER\n**Dependencies**: None (starting point)\n**Strategy**: Parallel development - Mobile and Web platforms set up simultaneously\n\n## Changelog\n\n### 2026-02-07 - Initial Analysis Created\n- **Status**: 📝 Analysis Complete\n- **Notes**: Created detailed phase analysis document with NOW/AFTER comparison, schema verification, and 5 implementation steps\n- **Next**: Begin Step 1.1 (Initialize React Native Expo Project)\n\n---\n\n## Current State Analysis (NOW)\n\n### Current Implementation\n**Location**: &#96;../../../&#96; (Next.js web app - parent waqup-app directory)\n\n**What Exists**:\n- ✅ Next.js 14 App Router application\n- ✅ Supabase integration (web)\n- ✅ TypeScript configuration\n- ✅ Tailwind CSS styling\n- ✅ Authentication system (web)\n- ✅ Database schema (PostgreSQL)\n- ✅ API routes (Next.js API routes)\n\n**Current Tech Stack**:\n- **Frontend**: Next.js 14, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS\n- **Backend**: Supabase (PostgreSQL, Auth, Storage)\n- **Deployment**: Vercel\n- **State Management**: React Context, Zustand (partial)\n- **Audio**: Web Audio API\n\n**Current Project Structure**:\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nwaqup-app/\n├── app/                    # Next.js App Router\n│   ├── (auth)/            # Auth routes\n│   ├── (sanctuary)/       # Protected routes\n│   ├── (onboarding)/      # Onboarding flow\n│   ├── (marketing)/       # Marketing pages\n│   ├── api/               # API routes\n│   ├── components/        # React components\n│   └── lib/               # Utilities\n├── docs/                  # Documentation\n├── public/                # Static assets\n├── supabase/              # Supabase config\n└── package.json           # Dependencies\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**Current Limitations**:",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {

            "lineNumber": 2
          },

          },
          {
            "text": "**Goal**: Set up clean, production-ready projects for Mobile (React Native + Expo for Android/iOS) and Web (Next.js for desktop browsers) simultaneously, configure all core dependencies, and establish connection to Supabase across both platforms",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "**Dependencies**: None (starting point)",

Create TypeScript types for Affirmation, Meditation, Ritual\n- [ ] Define structure for each type (based on scientific foundations)\n- [ ] Create content type enums and constants\n- [ ] Add validation schemas (using Zod)\n- [ ] Document differences between types\n- [ ] Create content factory/helper functions\n\n**Deliverables**:\n- Type system for content\n- Validation schemas\n\n**Success       "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.cursorrules",

          "startPosition": {
            "line": 929

          "endPosition": {
            "line": 982
          }
        },
        "contents": "2. **Implement on both platforms** - Mobile and Web simultaneously\n3. **Test frequently** - after each change on both platforms\n4. **Update changelog** - mark progress\n5. **Document decisions** - note why choices were made\n6. **Keep schemas coherent** - verify at each step\n7. **Ensure consistency** - UI/UX consistent across platforms\n\n### After Completing a Step\n\n1. **Verify UI checkpoint** - see visible progress on both platforms\n2. **Test functionality** - ensure it works on Mobile and Web\n3. **Verify consistency** - UI/UX consistent across platforms\n4. **Update changelog** - mark complete with date in &#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&#96;\n5. **Update docs** - if needed\n6. **Commit changes** - with descriptive message\n\n### When Re-Running a Step\n\n1. **Check changelog** - see what was done before in &#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&#96;\n2. **Update changelog** - add new entry with date\n3. **Note changes** - what was updated\n4. **Keep history** - don't delete previous entries\n5. **Test all platforms** - ensure changes work on all platforms\n\n---\n\n## Key Requirements\n\n### Voice-First Design\n- **Audio is primary** - text/visual are secondary\n- **Background audio** - support background playback\n- **Handle interruptions** - calls, notifications\n- **Voice recording** - high-quality capture\n\n### Three Content Types (NOT Interchangeable)\n- **Affirmations** - Cognitive re-patterning (shallow → medium)\n- **Guided Meditations** - State induction (medium)\n- **Rituals** - Identity encoding (deepest)\n\n**Reference**: Use Context7 to query &#96;../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md&#96;\n\n### Conversation Over Forms\n- **No static forms** - all creation through dialogue\n- **Chat-like interface** - conversational UI\n- **Context-aware** - adapts based on responses\n- **State machine** - manage conversation flow\n\n### Practice is Free\n- **Unlimited replay** - no credit consumption for playback\n- **Credits for creation** - only creation costs credits\n- **No subscription pressure** - user autonomy\n\n### User Autonomy",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {

          },
          {
            "text": "## Key Requirements",
            "lineNumber": 956
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 957
          },
          {
            "text": "### Voice-First Design",
            "lineNumber": 958
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Audio is primary** - text/visual are secondary",
            "lineNumber": 959
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Background audio** - support background playback",

            "text": "- **Handle interruptions** - calls, notifications",

          },

            "text": "- **Voice recording** - high-quality capture",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 963
          },
          {
            "text": "### Three Content Types (NOT Interchangeable)",
            "lineNumber": 964
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Affirmations** - Cognitive re-patterning (shallow → medium)",
            "lineNumber": 965
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Guided Meditations** - State induction (medium)",
            "lineNumber": 966
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Rituals** - Identity encoding (deepest)",
            "lineNumber": 967
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 968
          },
          {
            "text": "**Reference**: Use Context7 to query &#96;../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 969
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 970
          },
          {
            "text": "### Conversation Over Forms",
            "lineNumber": 971
          },
          {
            "text": "- **No static forms** - all creation through dialogue",
            "lineNumber": 972
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Chat-like interface** - conversational UI",
            "lineNumber": 973
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Context-aware** - adapts based on responses",
            "lineNumber": 974
          },
          {
            "text": "- **State machine** - manage conversation flow",
            "lineNumber": 975
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 976
          },
          {
            "text": "### Practice is Free",
            "lineNumber": 977
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Unlimited replay** - no credit consumption for playback",
            "lineNumber": 978
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Credits for creation** - only creation costs credits",
            "lineNumber": 979
          },
          {
            "text": "- **No subscription pressure** - user autonomy",
            "lineNumber": 980
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 981
          },
          {
            "text": "### User Autonomy",
            "lineNumber": 982
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3984200060367584
    },

        "contents": "# Phase 5: Content Definitions &amp; Types - Detailed Analysis\n\n## Overview\n**Goal**: Implement the three content types (Affirmations, Meditations, Rituals) with proper TypeScript definitions, validation schemas, and creation flow structures\n**Status**: ⏳ Pending → Ready to start after Phase 4\n**Dependencies**: Phase 4 (Core Pages Structure)\n\n## Changelog\n\n### 2026-02-07 - Initial Analysis Created\n- **Status**: 📝 Analysis Complete\n- **Notes**: Created detailed phase analysis with NOW/AFTER comparison and implementation steps\n- **Next**: Begin after Phase 4 completion\n\n---\n\n## Current State Analysis (NOW)\n\n### Current Implementation\n**Location**: Create screen exists but flows are empty\n\n**What Exists** (After Phase 4):\n- ✅ Create screen with three options\n- ✅ Navigation to creation flows\n- ❌ No content type definitions\n- ❌ No validation schemas\n- ❌ No creation flow structure\n\n**Current Schema**:\n- content_items table may exist but structure unclear\n\n**Current Features**:\n- Create Screen: ✅ Entry point exists\n- Content Types: ❌ Not defined\n- Validation: ❌ Not implemented\n- Creation Flows: ❌ Empty\n\n---\n\n## Target State (AFTER)\n\n### Target Implementation\n**New Location**: &#96;src/types/content.ts&#96;, &#96;src/schemas/content.ts&#96;, &#96;src/screens/create/&#96;\n\n**What Will Exist**:\n- ✅ TypeScript types for all three content types\n- ✅ Zod validation schemas\n- ✅ Content type enums and constants\n- ✅ Detail screens for each content type (structure)\n- ✅ Multi-step creation flows (structure)\n\n**Target Features**:\n- Type System: ✅ Complete definitions\n- Validation: ✅ Zod schemas\n- Detail Screens: ✅ Structure ready\n- Creation Flows: ✅ All steps defined\n\n---\n\n## Schema Verification\n\n### Current Schema (NOW)\n| Table/Field | Type | Status | Notes |\n|------------|------|--------|-------|\n| content_items | Table | ⏳ | Structure to verify |\n| content_type | Enum | ⏳ | Should be: affirmation, meditation, ritual |\n\n### Target Schema (AFTER)\n| Table/Field | Type | Status | Notes |\n|------------|------|--------|-------|\n| content_items | Table | ✅ | Verified structure |",
        "signatures": {},

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./rebuild-roadmap/02-phases/09-phase-09-ai-integration.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {

          "endPosition": {

        },
        "contents": "|------------|------|--------|-------|\n| content_items.script | Field | ✅ | Populated by AI |\n| content_items.audio_url | Field | ✅ | Populated by TTS |\n\n### Schema Changes Required\n- None (using existing fields)\n\n---\n\n## Implementation Steps\n\n### Step 9.1: Set Up OpenAI Integration\n**Goal**: Connect to OpenAI API for content generation\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Set up OpenAI client\n- [ ] Create API route/function for script generation\n- [ ] Create prompts for each content type (Affirmation, Meditation, Ritual)\n- [ ] Add prompt engineering based on scientific foundations\n- [ ] Add error handling for API failures\n- [ ] Add rate limiting\n- [ ] Add cost tracking\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: Can generate scripts, see them in creation flows\n\n---\n\n### Step 9.2: Integrate OpenAI TTS\n**Goal**: Generate audio from text using OpenAI TTS\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Set up OpenAI TTS API calls\n- [ ] Create TTS generation function\n- [ ] Add voice selection (alloy, echo, fable, onyx, nova, shimmer)\n- [ ] Add SSML support for prosody control\n- [ ] Add audio format selection (mp3, opus)\n- [ ] Store generated audio in Supabase Storage\n- [ ] Add progress tracking for generation\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: Can generate audio, hear it play, see it stored\n\n---\n\n### Step 9.3: Implement Conversation Flow\n**Goal**: Create conversational content creation\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Design conversation UI (chat-like interface)\n- [ ] Create conversation state machine\n- [ ] Implement conversation steps for each content type\n- [ ] Add context gathering through conversation\n- [ ] Add conversation history management\n- [ ] Add ability to go back and edit responses\n- [ ] Connect to OpenAI for conversational responses\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: See chat interface, have conversation, generate content\n\n---\n\n## Verification Checklist\n\n### AI Integration\n- [ ] OpenAI connection works\n- [ ] Script generation works\n- [ ] TTS generation works\n- [ ] Error handling works\n- [ ] Cost tracking works\n\n### Conversation Flow\n- [ ] Conversation UI works\n- [ ] State machine works\n- [ ] Context gathering works\n- [ ] Content generation works\n\n---\n\n## References",

        "detailedLines": [

Phase 9: AI Integration\n\n### Step 9.1: Set Up OpenAI Integration\n**Goal**: Connect to OpenAI API for content generation\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Set up OpenAI client\n- [ ] Create API route/function for script generation\n- [ ] Create prompts for each content type (Affirmation, Meditation, Ritual)\n- [ ] Add prompt engineering based on scientific foundations\n- [ ] Add error handling for API failures\n- [ ] Add rate limiting\n- [ ] Add cost tracking\n\n**Deliverables**:\n- OpenAI integration ready\n\n**Success Criteria**: Can generate content using OpenAI\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: Can generate scripts, see them in creation flows\n\n---\n\n### Step 9.2: Integrate OpenAI TTS\n**Goal**: Generate audio from text using OpenAI TTS\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Set up OpenAI TTS API calls\n- [ ] Create TTS generation function\n- [ ] Add voice selection (alloy, echo, fable, onyx, nova, shimmer)\n- [ ] Add SSML support for prosody control\n- [ ] Add audio format selection (mp3, opus)\n- [ ] Store generated audio in Supabase Storage\n- [ ] Add progress tracking for generation\n\n**Deliverables**:\n- TTS integration working\n\n**Success Criteria**: Can generate audio from text\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: Can generate audio, hear it play, see it stored\n\n---\n\n### Step 9.3: Implement Conversation Flow\n**Goal**: Create conversational content creation\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Design conversation UI (chat-like interface)\n- [ ] Create conversation state machine\n- [ ] Implement conversation steps for each content type\n- [ ] Add context gathering through conversation\n- [ ] Add conversation history management\n- [ ] Add ability to go back and edit responses\n- [ ] Connect to OpenAI for conversational responses\n\n**Deliverables**:\n- Conversational creation flow\n\n**Success Criteria**: Can create content through conversation\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: See chat interface, have conversation, generate content\n\n---\n\n## Phase 10: Payment &amp; Credits\n\n### Step 10.1: Integrate Stripe",

          {

          },
          {

          },

          },

          },
          {

          },

          },

        "contents": "# Phase 9: AI Integration - Detailed Analysis\n\n## Overview\n**Goal**: Integrate OpenAI for content generation (scripts and TTS) and implement conversational content creation flow\n**Status**: ⏳ Pending → Ready to start after Phase 8\n**Dependencies**: Phase 8 (Audio System)\n\n## Changelog\n\n### 2026-02-07 - Initial Analysis Created\n- **Status**: 📝 Analysis Complete\n- **Notes**: Created detailed phase analysis with NOW/AFTER comparison and implementation steps\n- **Next**: Begin after Phase 8 completion\n\n---\n\n## Current State Analysis (NOW)\n\n### Current Implementation\n**Location**: Creation flows exist but are non-functional\n\n**What Exists** (After Phases 1-8):\n- ✅ Creation flow structures\n- ✅ Form inputs\n- ✅ Audio system ready\n- ❌ No AI integration\n- ❌ No script generation\n- ❌ No TTS generation\n- ❌ No conversational flow\n\n**Current Features**:\n- Creation Flows: ✅ Structure exists\n- AI Integration: ❌ Not implemented\n- Script Generation: ❌ Not implemented\n- TTS: ❌ Not implemented\n\n---\n\n## Target State (AFTER)\n\n### Target Implementation\n**New Location**: &#96;src/services/ai/&#96;, &#96;src/hooks/useAI.ts&#96;, &#96;src/screens/create/conversation/&#96;\n\n**What Will Exist**:\n- ✅ OpenAI integration for script generation\n- ✅ OpenAI TTS integration\n- ✅ Conversational creation flow\n- ✅ Prompt engineering based on scientific foundations\n- ✅ Cost optimization (GPT-4o-mini, Batch API)\n\n**Target Features**:\n- Script Generation: ✅ Working for all content types\n- TTS: ✅ Audio generation from text\n- Conversation: ✅ Chat-like creation flow\n- Cost Optimization: ✅ Implemented\n\n---\n\n## Schema Verification\n\n### Current Schema (NOW)\n| Table/Field | Type | Status | Notes |\n|------------|------|--------|-------|\n| content_items.script | Field | ✅ | Should exist |\n| content_items.audio_url | Field | ✅ | Should exist |\n\n### Target Schema (AFTER)\n| Table/Field | Type | Status | Notes |\n|------------|------|--------|-------|\n| content_items.script | Field | ✅ | Populated by AI |\n| content_items.audio_url | Field | ✅ | Populated by TTS |",
        "signatures": {},

        "contents": "3. **Are types shared?** → Import from shared\n4. **Is error handling proper?** → Add error handling\n5. **Are loading states handled?** → Add loading states\n6. **Is this production-ready?** → Review against standards\n\n---\n\n## Quick Reference\n\n### ✅ DO\n- Put business logic in &#96;packages/shared/&#96;\n- Import types from shared\n- Use shared services for API calls\n- Use shared stores for state\n- Use shared schemas for validation\n- Follow consistent architecture\n- Test on all platforms\n- Update changelog\n\n### ❌ DON'T\n- Duplicate code across platforms\n- Create types in platform folders\n- Create API services in platform folders\n- Create stores in platform folders\n- Create validation schemas in platform folders\n- Skip error handling\n- Skip loading states\n- Skip empty states\n- Commit without testing\n\n---\n\n## Database &amp; Schema\n\n### Current Schema\n- **Same database as web app** - Supabase PostgreSQL\n- **Reference**: &#96;rebuild-roadmap/01-planning/02-schema-verification.md&#96;\n\n### Missing Tables (To Be Created)\n- &#96;content_items&#96; - Unified table for affirmations/meditations/rituals\n- &#96;credit_transactions&#96; - Credit system tracking\n- &#96;conversations&#96; - Conversational creation flow\n\n### Schema Changes\n- **Always verify schemas** - check coherence\n- **Create migrations** - for schema changes\n- **Update docs** - document schema changes\n- **Test RLS policies** - verify security\n\n---\n\n## Implementation Workflow\n\n### Before Starting a Step\n\n1. **Read phase analysis** - &#96;rebuild-roadmap/02-phases/01-phase-XX-*.md&#96;\n2. **Check changelog** - &#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&#96;\n3. **Use Context7** - query relevant documentation\n4. **Review docs** - understand requirements\n5. **Understand NOW state** - current implementation\n6. **Plan AFTER state** - target implementation\n7. **Check multi-platform strategy** - &#96;docs/03-platforms/01-multi-platform-strategy.md&#96;\n\n### During Implementation\n\n1. **Follow step-by-step** - don't skip steps\n2. **Implement on both platforms** - Mobile and Web simultaneously\n3. **Test frequently** - after each change on both platforms",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "3. **Are types shared?** → Import from shared",
            "lineNumber": 864
          },
          {
            "text": "4. **Is error handling proper?** → Add error handling",
            "lineNumber": 865
          },
          {
            "text": "5. **Are loading states handled?** → Add loading states",
            "lineNumber": 866
          },
          {
            "text": "6. **Is this production-ready?** → Review against standards",
            "lineNumber": 867
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 868
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 869
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 870
          },
          {
            "text": "## Quick Reference",
            "lineNumber": 871
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 872
          },
          {
            "text": "### ✅ DO",
            "lineNumber": 873
          },
          {
            "text": "- Put business logic in &#96;packages/shared/&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 874
          },
          {
            "text": "- Import types from shared",
            "lineNumber": 875
          },
          {
            "text": "- Use shared services for API calls",
            "lineNumber": 876

          {
            "text": "- Use shared stores for state",
            "lineNumber": 877

          },
          {

          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 882
          },
          {
            "text": "### ❌ DON'T",
            "lineNumber": 883
          },
          {
            "text": "- Duplicate code across platforms",
            "lineNumber": 884
          },
          {
            "text": "- Create types in platform folders",

          },
          {
            "text": "- Create API services in platform folders",
            "lineNumber": 886
          },
          {
            "text": "- Create stores in platform folders",

          },

            "lineNumber": 888
          },
          {
            "text": "- Skip error handling",

          },
          {
            "text": "- Skip loading states",
            "lineNumber": 890
          },
          {
            "text": "- Skip empty states",
            "lineNumber": 891
          },
          {
            "text": "- Commit without testing",
            "lineNumber": 892
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 893
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 895

        "contents": "const CONTENT_TYPES: ContentType[] = [\n  {\n    name: 'Create Affirmation',\n    description: 'Powerful statements to rewire your subconscious mind',\n    icon: Sparkles,\n    href: '/sanctuary/affirmations/create',\n    color: 'primary',\n  },\n  {\n    name: 'Create Meditation',\n    description: 'Guided meditations for deep relaxation and transformation',\n    icon: Brain,\n    href: '/sanctuary/meditations/create',\n    color: 'secondary',\n  },\n  {\n    name: 'Create Ritual',\n    description: 'Personalized rituals combining voice, frequencies, and intention',\n    icon: Music,\n    href: '/sanctuary/rituals/create',\n    color: 'tertiary',\n  },\n];\n\nexport default function CreatePage() {\n  const { theme } = useTheme();\n  const colors = theme.colors;\n\n  return (\n    &lt;PageShell intensity=\"medium\"&gt;\n      &lt;div style={{ maxWidth: '1400px', margin: '0 auto' }}&gt;\n          {/* Header */}\n          &lt;div style={{ marginBottom: spacing.xl }}&gt;\n            &lt;Typography variant=\"h1\" style={{ marginBottom: spacing.sm, color: colors.text.primary }}&gt;\n              Create New Content\n            &lt;/Typography&gt;\n}",

            "text": "export default function CreatePage() {",

        "contents": "| Table/Field | Type | Status | Notes |\n|------------|------|--------|-------|\n| content_items | Table | ⏳ | Will be populated in Phase 7 |\n\n### Schema Changes Required\n- None (structure only, no data yet)\n\n---\n\n## Implementation Steps\n\n### Step 4.1: Build Home/Sanctuary Screen\n**Goal**: Create main dashboard screen with empty state\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Design home screen layout\n- [ ] Add header with user greeting\n- [ ] Add empty state for no content\n- [ ] Add quick action buttons (Create Affirmation, Create Meditation, Create Ritual)\n- [ ] Add navigation to other sections\n- [ ] Add placeholder for stats\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: See home screen with empty states and action buttons\n\n---\n\n### Step 4.2: Build Library Screen\n**Goal**: Create content library screen (empty)\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Design library screen layout\n- [ ] Add filter tabs (All, Affirmations, Meditations, Rituals)\n- [ ] Add search bar (non-functional for now)\n- [ ] Add empty state with illustration\n- [ ] Add grid/list view toggle (placeholder)\n- [ ] Add sorting options (placeholder)\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: See library screen with filters and empty state\n\n---\n\n### Step 4.3: Build Create Screen\n**Goal**: Create content creation entry point\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Design create screen with three options\n- [ ] Add cards for: Create Affirmation, Create Meditation, Create Ritual\n- [ ] Add descriptions for each type\n- [ ] Add navigation to creation flows (empty flows for now)\n- [ ] Add visual indicators (icons, colors)\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: See create screen with three beautiful option cards\n\n---\n\n### Step 4.4: Build Profile/Settings Screen\n**Goal**: Create user profile and settings screen\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Design profile screen layout\n- [ ] Add user info section (name, email, avatar placeholder)\n- [ ] Add settings list (Preferences, Notifications, Credits, About, Logout)\n- [ ] Add navigation to each setting section\n- [ ] Add logout functionality\n- [ ] Add app version display\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: See profile screen with settings list, logout works\n\n---\n\n## Verification Checklist\n\n### Code Quality",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./packages/web/app/(marketing)/how-it-works/page.tsx",
