        },
        "contents": "'use client';\n\nimport React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { Typography, Button } from '@/components';\nimport { useTheme } from '@/theme';\nimport { PageShell } from '@/components';\nimport { spacing, borderRadius } from '@/theme';\nimport Link from 'next/link';\nimport {\n  Sunrise,\n  Bell,\n  Brain,\n  Zap,\n  Heart,\n  Music,\n  Clock,\n  Download,\n  Star,\n  Users,\n  Sparkles,\n  ArrowRight,\n  Check,\n} from 'lucide-react';\n\nconst steps = [\n  {\n    icon: Sunrise,\n    title: 'Morning Ritual',\n    description: 'Start your day with intention',\n    detail: 'Begin each morning with a personalized combination of meditation and powerful affirmations, designed to align with your energy and goals.',\n    highlight: 'AI-powered personalization adapts to your preferences',\n  },\n  {\n    icon: Bell,\n    title: 'Daily Reminders',\n    description: 'Stay consistent with gentle nudges',\n    detail: 'Receive thoughtful notifications at your preferred times, helping you maintain your practice and build lasting habits.',\n    highlight: 'Smart scheduling based on your most successful sessions',\n  },\n  {\n    icon: Brain,\n    title: 'Sacred Guide',\n    description: 'Your personal spiritual companion',\n    detail: 'Let our intelligent system guide your growth with personalized recommendations for meditations, affirmations, and practices.',\n    highlight: 'Learns and evolves with your spiritual journey',\n  },\n  {\n    icon: Zap,\n    title: 'Track Your Growth',\n    description: 'Visualize your transformation',\n    detail: 'Monitor your progress with beautiful insights, celebrate streaks, and unlock achievements as you deepen your practice.',\n    highlight: 'Watch your consistency build lasting change',\n  },\n];\n\nconst benefits = [\n  {\n    icon: Heart,\n    title: 'Personalized Experience',\n,\n];",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "'use client';",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {

          },
          {

          {
            "text": "import { PageShell } from '@/components';",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "import { spacing, borderRadius } from '@/theme';",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "import Link from 'next/link';",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "import {",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "  Sunrise,",
            "lineNumber": 10

            "lineNumber": 11

            "text": "  Brain,",
            "lineNumber": 12

          {
            "text": "  Zap,",
            "lineNumber": 13

            "lineNumber": 14

          {

            "text": "  Download,",

          {
            "text": "  Star,",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "  Users,",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "  Sparkles,",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "  ArrowRight,",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "  Check,",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "} from 'lucide-react';",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "const steps = [",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "  {",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "    icon: Sunrise,",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "    title: 'Morning Ritual',",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "    description: 'Start your day with intention',",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "    detail: 'Begin each morning with a personalized combination of meditation and powerful affirmations, designed to align with your energy and goals.',",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "    highlight: 'AI-powered personalization adapts to your preferences',",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "  },",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "  {",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "    icon: Bell,",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "    title: 'Daily Reminders',",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "    description: 'Stay consistent with gentle nudges',",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "    detail: 'Receive thoughtful notifications at your preferred times, helping you maintain your practice and build lasting habits.',",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "    highlight: 'Smart scheduling based on your most successful sessions',",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "  },",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "  {",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "    icon: Brain,",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "    title: 'Sacred Guide',",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "    description: 'Your personal spiritual companion',",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "    detail: 'Let our intelligent system guide your growth with personalized recommendations for meditations, affirmations, and practices.',",
            "lineNumber": 44

            "lineNumber": 45

            "lineNumber": 54

            "lineNumber": 55

            "text": "const benefits = [",

          },

            "lineNumber": 58

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/01-core/README.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},

        },
        "contents": "# Core Product Documentation Reference\n\n**Purpose**: Reference guide to main waQup product documentation\n\n**Location**: &#96;../../docs/internal/&#96; (main waQup project)\n\n---\n\n## How to Access\n\n**Direct Access**: &#96;../../docs/internal/&#96;  \n**Use Context7**: Query docs using Context7 (recommended)\n\n---\n\n## Complete Documentation List\n\n### Core Documents (01-07)\n\n1. **01-product-constitution.md**\n   - Core identity, principles, boundaries\n   - Three content types definition\n   - Voice-first design principles\n\n2. **02-scientific-foundations.md**\n   - Scientific backing and research\n   - Neuroplasticity, subconscious mind\n   - Voice prosody effects\n\n3. **03-conversational-system.md**\n   - Conversation flows\n   - Content types (affirmations, meditations, rituals)\n   - State machine\n\n4. **04-ai-voice-ethics.md**\n   - AI voice guidelines\n   - Ethical boundaries\n   - Privacy principles\n\n5. **05-system-architecture.md**\n   - Complete system architecture\n   - APIs, infrastructure\n   - Technology stack\n\n6. **06-value-economy.md**\n   - Credits system\n   - Tokens and economic model\n   - Pricing structure\n\n7. **07-roadmap.md**\n   - Product roadmap\n   - Milestones\n   - Development phases\n\n### Technical Reference\n\n- **database.md** - Database schema, tables, RLS policies\n- **flows.md** - User flows, ritual creation, affirmation flow\n- **system-spec.md** - Technical specifications\n- **system-audit.md** - Implementation status\n- **undocumented-features.md** - Implemented features catalog\n\n### Audio &amp; AI\n\n- **audio-generation.md** - Voice cloning, TTS, ElevenLabs\n- **elevenlabs-advantages.md** - Why ElevenLabs\n- **audio-generation-improvements.md** - Cost optimizations\n- **audio-generation-best-option-analysis.md** - TTS comparison\n- **audio-generation-tested-alternatives.md** - Tested alternatives\n\n### Platform &amp; Features\n\n- **marketplace-platform.md** - Marketplace features\n- **voice-interaction-design.md** - Voice interaction patterns\n\n---\n\n## Using Context7\n\n**Recommended**: Use Context7 to query these docs",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./rebuild-roadmap/01-planning/01-roadmap.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 34
          }
        },
        "contents": "# waQup Production Rebuild Roadmap\n\n**Goal**: Rebuild waQup from scratch as a production-ready mobile app for iOS and Android app stores, with high-quality design, fast performance, and scientific backing.\n\n**Approach**: Each step is independently runnable with clear, visible UI differences. We build incrementally, testing at each stage.\n\n**Important**: For detailed analysis of each phase with \"now/after\" comparisons, schema verification, and step-by-step implementation details, see:\n- [Schema Verification](./02-schema-verification.md) - Complete database schema analysis\n- [Phase Analyses](../02-phases/) - Detailed analysis for each phase\n- [Changelog](../03-tracking/01-changelog.md) - **Track step completion and updates**\n- [Analysis Template](../03-tracking/02-analysis-template.md) - Template for phase analysis\n- [Step Tracking Template](../03-tracking/03-step-tracking.md) - Template for tracking individual steps\n- [Technology Stack](../../docs/02-mobile/01-technology-stack.md) - Finalized tech stack\n- [Architecture](../../docs/02-mobile/02-architecture.md) - Mobile architecture\n- [Implementation](../../docs/02-mobile/03-implementation.md) - Implementation guide\n\n**⚠️ IMPORTANT**: Always update [Changelog](../03-tracking/01-changelog.md) when completing or re-running steps!\n\n---\n\n## Table of Contents\n\n1. [Phase 0: Research &amp; Planning](#phase-0-research--planning)\n2. [Phase 1: Project Foundation](#phase-1-project-foundation)\n3. [Phase 2: Design System &amp; UI Foundation](#phase-2-design-system--ui-foundation)\n4. [Phase 3: Authentication System](#phase-3-authentication-system)\n5. [Phase 4: Core Pages Structure](#phase-4-core-pages-structure)\n6. [Phase 5: Content Definitions &amp; Types](#phase-5-content-definitions--types)\n7. [Phase 6: Error Handling &amp; Validation](#phase-6-error-handling--validation)\n8. [Phase 7: API Integration](#phase-7-api-integration)\n9. [Phase 8: Audio System](#phase-8-audio-system)\n10. [Phase 9: AI Integration](#phase-9-ai-integration)\n11. [Phase 10: Payment &amp; Credits](#phase-10-payment--credits)\n12. [Phase 11: Performance Optimization](#phase-11-performance-optimization)",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {

        "contents": "- [ ] Add navigation to other sections\n- [ ] Add placeholder for stats (will be populated later)\n\n**Deliverables**:\n- Home screen with structure\n\n**Success Criteria**: Screen looks good, navigation works, empty states shown\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: See home screen with empty states and action buttons\n\n---\n\n### Step 4.2: Build Library Screen\n**Goal**: Create content library screen (empty)\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Design library screen layout\n- [ ] Add filter tabs (All, Affirmations, Meditations, Rituals)\n- [ ] Add search bar (non-functional for now)\n- [ ] Add empty state with illustration\n- [ ] Add grid/list view toggle (placeholder)\n- [ ] Add sorting options (placeholder)\n\n**Deliverables**:\n- Library screen structure\n\n**Success Criteria**: Screen structure complete, filters visible\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: See library screen with filters and empty state\n\n---\n\n### Step 4.3: Build Create Screen\n**Goal**: Create content creation entry point\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Design create screen with three options\n- [ ] Add cards for: Create Affirmation, Create Meditation, Create Ritual\n- [ ] Add descriptions for each type\n- [ ] Add navigation to creation flows (empty flows for now)\n- [ ] Add visual indicators (icons, colors)\n\n**Deliverables**:\n- Create screen with three options\n\n**Success Criteria**: Can see three creation options, can navigate to flows\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: See create screen with three beautiful option cards\n\n---\n\n### Step 4.4: Build Profile/Settings Screen\n**Goal**: Create user profile and settings screen\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Design profile screen layout\n- [ ] Add user info section (name, email, avatar placeholder)\n- [ ] Add settings list (Preferences, Notifications, Credits, About, Logout)\n- [ ] Add navigation to each setting section\n- [ ] Add logout functionality\n- [ ] Add app version display\n\n**Deliverables**:\n- Profile screen with settings\n\n**Success Criteria**: Can see profile, navigate to settings, logout works\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: See profile screen with settings list, logout works\n\n---\n\n## Phase 5: Content Definitions &amp; Types",

        "contents": "│   ├── services/          # API services\n│   │   ├── supabase/\n│   │   ├── api/\n│   │   └── storage/\n│   ├── stores/            # Zustand stores\n│   ├── hooks/             # Custom hooks\n│   ├── types/             # TypeScript types\n│   ├── utils/             # Utilities\n│   └── constants/         # Constants\n├── assets/                # Images, fonts, etc.\n├── app.json               # Expo config\n├── package.json           # Dependencies\n└── tsconfig.json          # TypeScript config\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**Improvements**:\n1. ✅ Mobile-first architecture\n2. ✅ Cross-platform (iOS + Android)\n3. ✅ Native performance\n4. ✅ Offline support capability\n5. ✅ Push notifications ready\n6. ✅ App store deployment ready\n\n---\n\n## Schema Verification\n\n### Current Schema (NOW)\n**Status**: ✅ Database exists and is well-structured\n\n**Key Tables**:\n- &#96;users&#96; ✅\n- &#96;rituals&#96; ✅ (needs migration to &#96;content_items&#96;)\n- &#96;recordings&#96; ✅\n- &#96;practice_sessions&#96; ✅\n- &#96;sanctuary_progress&#96; ✅\n- &#96;achievements&#96; ✅\n- &#96;user_achievements&#96; ✅\n\n**Missing Tables** (see SCHEMA_VERIFICATION.md):\n- ❌ &#96;content_items&#96; (unified table)\n- ❌ &#96;credit_transactions&#96;\n- ❌ &#96;conversations&#96;\n\n### Target Schema (AFTER)\n**Status**: Same database, mobile app will use it\n\n**No Schema Changes Required** for Phase 1, but:\n- ⚠️ Need to verify Supabase connection works from React Native\n- ⚠️ Need to test RLS policies work with mobile app\n- ⚠️ Need to verify storage access works\n\n### Schema Coherence Check\n- [x] Database exists and is accessible\n- [x] Supabase project configured\n- [ ] Test connection from React Native\n- [ ] Verify RLS policies work\n- [ ] Test storage access\n\n---\n\n## Implementation Steps\n\n### Step 1.1: Initialize All Platform Projects\n**Goal**: Create Mobile (React Native + Expo) and Web (Next.js) projects with TypeScript\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Initialize Mobile: Run &#96;npx create-expo-app@latest mobile --template blank-typescript&#96;\n- [ ] Initialize Web: Run &#96;npx create-next-app@latest web --typescript --app&#96;",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.cursorrules",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 42
          }
        },
        "contents": "# waQup Mobile App - Cursor Rules\n\n## Project Context\n\nThis is the **waQup multi-platform rebuild** - building Mobile (React Native + Expo for Android/iOS) and Web (Next.js for desktop browsers) apps **simultaneously from scratch**. This is the **main development repository** for the new waQup platform.\n\n**Location**: &#96;waqup-app/waqup-new/&#96; (this is the active development repo)\n**Strategy**: **Parallel Development** - Mobile and Web platforms developed simultaneously\n**Tech Stack**: \n- **Mobile**: React Native + Expo SDK 54 + TypeScript 5.9.3 (Android + iOS)\n- **Web**: Next.js 16.1.6 + TypeScript 5.9.3 (Desktop browsers - Chrome-first)\n- **Shared**: Supabase backend (same as web app)\n**Goal**: Production-ready apps for iOS, Android, and Web browsers (Chrome-first, PWA support)\n\n---\n\n## Core Principles\n\n### 1. Step-by-Step Verification\n- **Each step must be independently testable**\n- **Clear UI checkpoints at each step** - visible progress\n- **Update changelog** (&#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&#96;) when completing steps\n- **If re-running a step, update changelog with new entry**\n\n### 2. Now/After Analysis\n- **Always document current state (NOW)** before changes\n- **Always document target state (AFTER)** after changes\n- **Use phase analysis documents** (&#96;rebuild-roadmap/02-phases/&#96;) for detailed analysis\n- **Keep schemas coherent** - verify database schemas at each phase\n\n### 3. Documentation First\n- **Base all work on existing docs** in &#96;../../docs/&#96; and &#96;docs/&#96;\n- **Use Context7 to query docs** - fastest and most accurate\n- **Reference scientific foundations** from &#96;../../docs/internal/02-scientific-foundations.md&#96;\n- **Follow product constitution** from &#96;../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md&#96;\n- **Update docs as you go** - keep documentation in sync with code\n\n### 4. Production Quality\n- **Not prototypes** - everything must be production-ready\n- **Proper error handling** - graceful error states everywhere\n- **Loading states** - show loading indicators during async operations\n- **Empty states** - beautiful empty states for all screens",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# waQup Mobile App - Cursor Rules",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },

            "text": "## Project Context",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "This is the **waQup multi-platform rebuild** - building Mobile (React Native + Expo for Android/iOS) and Web (Next.js for desktop browsers) apps **simultaneously from scratch**. This is the **main development repository** for the new waQup platform.",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "**Location**: &#96;waqup-app/waqup-new/&#96; (this is the active development repo)",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "**Strategy**: **Parallel Development** - Mobile and Web platforms developed simultaneously",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "**Tech Stack**: ",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Mobile**: React Native + Expo SDK 54 + TypeScript 5.9.3 (Android + iOS)",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Web**: Next.js 16.1.6 + TypeScript 5.9.3 (Desktop browsers - Chrome-first)",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Shared**: Supabase backend (same as web app)",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "**Goal**: Production-ready apps for iOS, Android, and Web browsers (Chrome-first, PWA support)",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "## Core Principles",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "### 1. Step-by-Step Verification",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Each step must be independently testable**",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Clear UI checkpoints at each step** - visible progress",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Update changelog** (&#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&#96;) when completing steps",
            "lineNumber": 22

          {
            "text": "- **If re-running a step, update changelog with new entry**",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2. Now/After Analysis",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Always document current state (NOW)** before changes",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Always document target state (AFTER)** after changes",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Use phase analysis documents** (&#96;rebuild-roadmap/02-phases/&#96;) for detailed analysis",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Keep schemas coherent** - verify database schemas at each phase",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "### 3. Documentation First",
            "lineNumber": 31

          {
            "text": "- **Base all work on existing docs** in &#96;../../docs/&#96; and &#96;docs/&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Use Context7 to query docs** - fastest and most accurate",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Reference scientific foundations** from &#96;../../docs/internal/02-scientific-foundations.md&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {

      "codeBlock": {

        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},

            "line": 56

        "contents": "# waQup Mobile App Rebuild - Roadmap &amp; Planning\n\n**Purpose**: Complete roadmap and planning for mobile app rebuild\n\n---\n\n## 📋 Table of Contents\n\n1. [Structure](#structure)\n2. [Quick Navigation](#quick-navigation)\n3. [Development Setup](#development-setup)\n   - [Quick Start (Automated Setup)](#-quick-start-automated-setup)\n   - [Prerequisites](#prerequisites)\n   - [Local Development (Manual Setup)](#local-development-manual-setup)\n     - [Windows](#local-development-windows)\n     - [Linux/macOS](#local-development-linuxmacos)\n4. [Development Pipeline](#development-pipeline)\n5. [Production Pipeline](#production-pipeline)\n6. [How to Use](#how-to-use)\n7. [Key Principles](#key-principles)\n\n---\n\n## Structure\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nrebuild-roadmap/\n├── README.md                    # This file\n│\n├── 01-planning/                 # Planning documents\n│   ├── 01-roadmap.md           # Main roadmap (13 phases)\n│   └── 02-schema-verification.md # Database schema analysis\n│\n├── 02-phases/                   # Phase analyses\n│   ├── 01-phase-01-project-foundation.md\n│   └── [More phases...]\n│\n└── 03-tracking/                 # Tracking &amp; templates\n    ├── 01-changelog.md         # Step completion tracking\n    ├── 02-analysis-template.md # Phase analysis template\n    └── 03-step-tracking.md     # Step tracking template\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n---\n\n## Quick Navigation\n\n### 📋 Planning (&#96;01-planning/&#96;)\n- **[01 Roadmap](./01-planning/01-roadmap.md)** - Complete rebuild roadmap (13 phases, 50+ steps)\n- **[02 Schema Verification](./01-planning/02-schema-verification.md)** - Database schema analysis\n\n### 🔍 Phase Analyses (&#96;02-phases/&#96;)\n- **[00 Phase 0: Research &amp; Planning](./02-phases/00-phase-00-research-planning.md)** - ✅ Complete\n- **[01 Phase 1: Project Foundation](./02-phases/01-phase-01-project-foundation.md)** - Detailed analysis\n- **[02 Phase 2: Design System &amp; UI Foundation](./02-phases/02-phase-02-design-system-ui-foundation.md)** - Stub ready\n- **[03 Phase 3: Authentication System](./02-phases/03-phase-03-authentication-system.md)** - Stub ready",

        "contents": "**Tracking** (&#96;03-tracking/&#96;):\n- &#96;01-changelog.md&#96; - Step completion tracking, updates, status\n- &#96;02-analysis-template.md&#96; - Template for creating phase analysis documents\n- &#96;03-step-tracking.md&#96; - Template for tracking individual steps\n\n### Using Context7 for Documentation\n\n**ALWAYS use Context7 when you need documentation information:**\n\n1. **For Product Understanding**:\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n   Use Context7 to query: \"What are the three content types in waQup and how do they differ?\"\n   Reference: ../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n2. **For Scientific Backing**:\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n   Use Context7 to query: \"What is the scientific foundation for voice-first design?\"\n   Reference: ../../docs/internal/02-scientific-foundations.md\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n3. **For Technical Architecture**:\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n   Use Context7 to query: \"How does the conversation system work?\"\n   Reference: ../../docs/internal/03-conversational-system.md\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n4. **For Database Schema**:\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n   Use Context7 to query: \"What is the database schema for content items?\"\n   Reference: ../../docs/internal/database.md\n   OR\n   Reference: rebuild-roadmap/01-planning/02-schema-verification.md\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n5. **For Audio Generation**:\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n   Use Context7 to query: \"How does ElevenLabs voice cloning work?\"\n   Reference: ../../docs/internal/audio-generation.md\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n6. **For Technology Stack**:\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n   Use Context7 to query: \"What is the finalized tech stack for mobile?\"\n   Reference: docs/02-mobile/01-technology-stack.md\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n7. **For Implementation Details**:\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n   Use Context7 to query: \"What are the implementation patterns for React Native?\"\n   Reference: docs/02-mobile/03-implementation.md\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n8. **For Architecture**:\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n   Use Context7 to query: \"What is the mobile app architecture?\"\n   Reference: docs/02-mobile/02-architecture.md\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n**Context7 Usage Pattern**:\n- **Before implementing**: Query relevant docs using Context7\n- **When stuck**: Use Context7 to find answers in docs\n- **When verifying**: Use Context7 to check requirements\n- **When documenting**: Use Context7 to reference existing patterns",

          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "text": "**ALWAYS use Context7 when you need documentation information:**",

          },
          {
            "text": "1. **For Product Understanding**:",

          {

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 175
          },
          {

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 178
          },
          {

          },

          },
          {

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 184
          },
          {
            "text": "   Use Context7 to query: \"What is the database schema for content items?\"",

        "contents": "'use client';\n\nimport React from 'react';\nimport { Typography, Button } from '@/components';\nimport { useTheme } from '@/theme';\nimport { AppHeader, PageShell, ThemeSelector } from '@/components';\nimport { spacing, borderRadius } from '@/theme';\nimport Link from 'next/link';\nimport {\n  Sparkles,\n  Brain,\n  Music,\n  Zap,\n  Shield,\n  Heart,\n  ArrowRight,\n  Check,\n  Play,\n  Users,\n  Star,\n  ChevronRight,\n} from 'lucide-react';\n\nexport default function LandingPage() {\n  const { theme } = useTheme();\n  const colors = theme.colors;\n\n  const features = [\n    {\n      icon: Brain,\n      title: 'Neuroplasticity-Based',\n      description: 'Scientifically designed to rewire your subconscious mind through voice-first experiences',\n      color: colors.accent.primary,\n    },\n    {\n      icon: Music,\n      title: 'Voice Cloning',\n      description: 'Create personalized affirmations and rituals with your own voice or choose from our library',\n      color: colors.accent.secondary,\n    },\n    {\n      icon: Sparkles,\n      title: 'AI-Powered Creation',\n      description: 'Conversational AI guides you through creating transformative content tailored to your goals',\n      color: colors.accent.tertiary,\n    },\n    {\n      icon: Shield,\n      title: 'Privacy First',\n      description: 'Your voice data is encrypted and stored securely. You own your transformation journey',\n      color: colors.accent.primary,\n    },\n    {\n      icon: Heart,\n      title: 'Three Content Types',\n      description: 'Affirmations for cognitive re-patterning, Meditations for state induction, Rituals for identity encoding',\n      color: colors.accent.secondary,\n    },\n    {\n      icon: Zap,\n      title: 'Practice is Free',\n      description: 'Unlimited replay of your content. Credits only used for creation, never for practice',\n      color: colors.accent.tertiary,\n    },\n  ];\n\n  const benefits = [\n    'Transform your subconscious mind',\n,\n  ];\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./docs/03-platforms/01-multi-platform-strategy.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {

          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 399
          }

        "contents": "2. **Creator Tools**\n   - Creator dashboard\n   - Content publishing flow\n   - Pricing management\n   - Analytics dashboard\n\n3. **Verification System**\n   - Content verification workflow\n   - Verification badge system\n   - Quality standards enforcement\n\n4. **Viral Distribution**\n   - Shareable links\n   - Embeddable players\n   - Social media integration\n   - Viral tracking and analytics\n\n5. **Revenue System**\n   - Payment processing for marketplace\n   - Revenue split automation\n   - Creator payouts\n   - Marketplace analytics\n\n**Dependencies**: Phase 7 (API Integration), Phase 10 (Payment &amp; Credits)\n\n---\n\n### Phase 15: Social &amp; Community Features\n\n**Goal**: Add social features for community engagement\n\n**Steps**:\n1. **User Profiles**\n   - Public profiles\n   - Creator profiles\n   - Follow/unfollow system\n   - Profile customization\n\n2. **Sharing &amp; Discovery**\n   - Share content with users\n   - Create playlists\n   - Collections and favorites\n   - Social feed (future)\n\n3. **Reviews &amp; Ratings**\n   - Content reviews\n   - Rating system\n   - Review moderation\n   - Helpful votes\n\n4. **Community Features**\n   - Comments (future)\n   - Discussions (future)\n   - Groups (future)\n\n**Dependencies**: Phase 4 (Core Pages), Phase 7 (API Integration)\n\n---\n\n### Phase 16: Advanced Features\n\n**Goal**: Implement advanced features for power users\n\n**Steps**:\n1. **Practice Analytics**\n   - Practice history\n   - Streak tracking\n   - Progress visualization\n   - Insights and recommendations\n\n2. **Customization**\n   - Custom themes\n   - Layout preferences\n   - Audio preferences\n   - Notification preferences\n\n3. **Integrations**\n   - Calendar integration\n   - Health app integration (Apple Health, Google Fit)\n   - Wearable device support (Apple Watch, Wear OS)\n   - Smart home integration (future)\n\n4. **Advanced Audio**\n   - Playback speed control\n   - Sleep timer\n   - Fade in/out\n   - Audio effects\n\n**Dependencies**: Phase 8 (Audio System), Phase 7 (API Integration)\n\n---\n\n### Phase 17: Desktop App Development\n\n**Goal**: Build native desktop apps for macOS, Windows, Linux",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "2. **Creator Tools**",

            "lineNumber": 312
          },

            "text": "   - Verification badge system",
            "lineNumber": 313
          },

            "text": "   - Quality standards enforcement",
            "lineNumber": 314
          },
          {

          },

          },

          {

            "text": "**Dependencies**: Phase 7 (API Integration), Phase 10 (Payment &amp; Credits)",

          {

          {
            "lineNumber": 331

      "codeBlock": {

        "contents": "# Phase 4: Core Pages Structure - Detailed Analysis\n\n## Overview\n**Goal**: Build the core page structure for Home, Library, Create, and Profile screens with empty states and navigation\n**Status**: ⏳ Pending → Ready to start after Phase 3\n**Dependencies**: Phase 1 (Project Foundation), Phase 2 (Design System), Phase 3 (Authentication)\n\n## Changelog\n\n### 2026-02-07 - Initial Analysis Created\n- **Status**: 📝 Analysis Complete\n- **Notes**: Created detailed phase analysis with NOW/AFTER comparison and implementation steps\n- **Next**: Begin after Phase 3 completion\n\n---\n\n## Current State Analysis (NOW)\n\n### Current Implementation\n**Location**: Placeholder screens from Phase 1\n\n**What Exists** (After Phases 1-3):\n- ✅ Navigation structure\n- ✅ Placeholder screens (empty)\n- ✅ Authentication working\n- ✅ Design system ready\n- ❌ No content structure\n- ❌ No empty states\n- ❌ No navigation between content\n\n**Current Schema**:\n- Database tables exist but not populated\n\n**Current Features**:\n- Navigation: ✅ Basic structure\n- Screens: ✅ Placeholders exist\n- Content: ❌ No content displayed\n- Empty States: ❌ Not designed\n\n---\n\n## Target State (AFTER)\n\n### Target Implementation\n**New Location**: &#96;src/screens/&#96; (Home, Library, Create, Profile)\n\n**What Will Exist**:\n- ✅ Home/Sanctuary screen with empty state\n- ✅ Library screen with filters and empty state\n- ✅ Create screen with three options\n- ✅ Profile/Settings screen\n- ✅ Beautiful empty states\n- ✅ Navigation between screens\n\n**Target Features**:\n- Home Screen: ✅ Dashboard with empty state\n- Library Screen: ✅ Filters, search placeholder, empty state\n- Create Screen: ✅ Three creation options\n- Profile Screen: ✅ User info, settings list\n\n---\n\n## Schema Verification\n\n### Current Schema (NOW)\n| Table/Field | Type | Status | Notes |\n|------------|------|--------|-------|\n| content_items | Table | ⏳ | May not exist yet |\n| profiles | Table | ✅ | Exists |\n\n### Target Schema (AFTER)\n| Table/Field | Type | Status | Notes |\n|------------|------|--------|-------|",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {

---


Summary of the analysis and what was added:

---

## 1. **Analysis result**

### **Architecture**
- **In-repo**: `docs/02-mobile/02-architecture.md` — app layers, data flow, Supabase/OpenAI/ElevenLabs/Stripe.
- **External**: Full system (APIs, infra) is in `../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md`. There is no in-repo doc for the **web app** (Next.js layout, API routes).

### **LLM communication system**
- **In-repo**: Phase 9 and roadmap mention “conversation state machine”, “chat-like interface”, “context gathering”, and reference `03-conversational-system.md`.
- **Gap**: No in-repo spec for the **state machine** (states/transitions), **message/API contract**, or **prompt strategy**. That lives in `../../docs/internal/03-conversational-system.md`.

### **Pipelines (per content type)**
- **In-repo**: Step names only — Affirmation: Intent → Script → Voice → Review; Meditation: + Context; Ritual: + Context, Personalization (in roadmap and Phase 5).
- **Gap**: No in-repo doc that defines **per-step inputs/outputs**, which step calls the LLM, or mapping to routes. That detail is in external `flows.md`.

### **Pages**
- **In-repo**: `docs/04-reference/04-pages-comparison.md` is the **SSOT** and is up to date (auth, sanctuary, affirmations, rituals, meditations, speak, marketplace, gaps).

### **Marketplace**
- **In-repo**: Phase 14 (steps 14.1–14.5, schema notes) and the marketplace section in the pages comparison.
- **Gap**: No in-repo summary of discovery/creator/verification/viral/revenue; that’s in `../../docs/internal/marketplace-platform.md`.

### **Schema**
- **Gap**: `rebuild-roadmap/01-planning/02-schema-verification.md` was **referenced everywhere but missing**. It’s now added.

---

## 2. **What was created**

1. **`docs/04-reference/05-documentation-coverage-analysis.md`**  
   - What’s in-repo vs external for architecture, LLM, pipelines, pages, marketplace.  
   - Gaps and concrete recommendations.  
   - Checklist and suggested new docs (LLM summary, pipelines, marketplace summary, web arch).

2. **`rebuild-roadmap/01-planning/02-schema-verification.md`**  
   - Tables used by the app (profiles, content_items, credit_transactions, conversations).  
   - Phase 14 marketplace tables.  
   - Pointer to `../../docs/internal/database.md`.

3. **Links**  
   - From `04-pages-comparison.md` and `docs/README.md` to the new coverage analysis.

---

## 3. **Recommendations (from the analysis doc)**

| Priority | Action |
|----------|--------|
| **Done** | Create `02-schema-verification.md` (done). |
| **High** | Add an **LLM/conversation summary** (e.g. `07-llm-conversation-summary.md`): state machine, message contract, where prompts/APIs live; or copy the relevant part of `03-conversational-system.md` into this repo. |
| **High** | Add **creation pipelines** doc (e.g. `08-creation-pipelines.md`): steps per type, mapping to routes, conversational vs form steps. |
| **Medium** | Add **marketplace summary** (e.g. `09-marketplace-summary.md`): discovery, creator, verification, viral, revenue; link to `marketplace-platform.md`. |
| **Optional** | Add a short **web architecture** note (Next.js layout, auth, API usage). |

If you tell me which of these you want next (e.g. LLM summary or pipelines doc), I can draft the content and file structure.

# 🚀 waQup Mobile App - Start Here

**Welcome to the waQup mobile app rebuild project!**

This document will guide you through getting started with development.

---

## 📋 Quick Start Checklist

### ✅ Prerequisites
- [ ] Node.js 20.9.0+ (LTS) or Node.js 22+ (LTS) installed
- [ ] npm or yarn installed
- [ ] Git configured
- [ ] Expo CLI installed (&#96;npm install -g expo-cli&#96;)
- [ ] Xcode (for iOS) or Android Studio (for Android) - optional for web preview
- [ ] Supabase account and project
- [ ] OpenAI API key
- [ ] Stripe account (for payments)

### ✅ Initial Setup (Phase 1 - Step 1.1)

**Next Task**: Initialize platform projects (Mobile + Web) simultaneously

**Commands to Run**:
&#96;&#96;&#96;bash
# 1. Initialize Mobile (React Native + Expo)
npx create-expo-app@latest packages/mobile --template blank-typescript

# 2. Initialize Web (Next.js)
npx create-next-app@latest packages/web --typescript --app --tailwind --eslint

# 3. Set up monorepo workspace
# Configure package.json workspaces
&#96;&#96;&#96;

**See**: &#96;rebuild-roadmap/02-phases/01-phase-01-project-foundation.md&#96; for detailed steps

---

## 🎯 Current Phase

**Phase 1: Project Foundation** - Step 1.1

**Status**: ⏳ Ready to Start

**Goal**: Set up both platforms (Mobile + Web) simultaneously with shared codebase

---

## 📚 Essential Documentation

### Before Starting
1. **Read**: &#96;rebuild-roadmap/01-planning/01-roadmap.md&#96; - Complete roadmap
2. **Read**: &#96;rebuild-roadmap/02-phases/01-phase-01-project-foundation.md&#96; - Current phase details
3. **Read**: &#96;docs/02-mobile/01-technology-stack.md&#96; - Tech stack decisions
4. **Read**: &#96;docs/03-platforms/01-multi-platform-strategy.md&#96; - Multi-platform strategy

### During Development
- **Architecture**: &#96;docs/02-mobile/02-architecture.md&#96;
- **Implementation**: &#96;docs/02-mobile/03-implementation.md&#96;
- **Browser Strategy**: &#96;docs/03-platforms/02-browser-optimization-strategy.md&#96;

---

## 🔄 Development Workflow

### Step-by-Step Process

1. **Read Phase Analysis**: Check &#96;rebuild-roadmap/02-phases/01-phase-XX-*.md&#96;
2. **Read Step Details**: Follow implementation steps in phase doc
3. **Implement**: Code the feature
4. **Test**: Test on all platforms (Mobile, Desktop, Web)
5. **Update Changelog**: Mark step complete in &#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&#96;
6. **Commit**: Commit with descriptive message
7. **Move to Next Step**: Continue to next step in phase

### Testing Strategy

**All Platforms Simultaneously**:

```
</details>
</tool-use>

# 🚀 waQup Mobile App - Start Here

**Welcome to the waQup mobile app rebuild project!**

This document will guide you through getting started with development.

---

## 📋 Quick Start Checklist

### ✅ Prerequisites
- [ ] Node.js 20.9.0+ (LTS) or Node.js 22+ (LTS) installed
- [ ] npm or yarn installed
- [ ] Git configured
- [ ] Expo CLI installed (&#96;npm install -g expo-cli&#96;)
- [ ] Xcode (for iOS) or Android Studio (for Android) - optional for web preview
- [ ] Supabase account and project
- [ ] OpenAI API key
- [ ] Stripe account (for payments)

### ✅ Initial Setup (Phase 1 - Step 1.1)

**Next Task**: Initialize platform projects (Mobile + Web) simultaneously

**Commands to Run**:
&#96;&#96;&#96;bash
# 1. Initialize Mobile (React Native + Expo)
npx create-expo-app@latest packages/mobile --template blank-typescript

# 2. Initialize Web (Next.js)
npx create-next-app@latest packages/web --typescript --app --tailwind --eslint

# 3. Set up monorepo workspace
# Configure package.json workspaces
&#96;&#96;&#96;

**See**: &#96;rebuild-roadmap/02-phases/01-phase-01-project-foundation.md&#96; for detailed steps

---

## 🎯 Current Phase

**Phase 1: Project Foundation** - Step 1.1

**Status**: ⏳ Ready to Start

**Goal**: Set up both platforms (Mobile + Web) simultaneously with shared codebase

---

## 📚 Essential Documentation

### Before Starting
1. **Read**: &#96;rebuild-roadmap/01-planning/01-roadmap.md&#96; - Complete roadmap
2. **Read**: &#96;rebuild-roadmap/02-phases/01-phase-01-project-foundation.md&#96; - Current phase details
3. **Read**: &#96;docs/02-mobile/01-technology-stack.md&#96; - Tech stack decisions
4. **Read**: &#96;docs/03-platforms/01-multi-platform-strategy.md&#96; - Multi-platform strategy

### During Development
- **Architecture**: &#96;docs/02-mobile/02-architecture.md&#96;
- **Implementation**: &#96;docs/02-mobile/03-implementation.md&#96;
- **Browser Strategy**: &#96;docs/03-platforms/02-browser-optimization-strategy.md&#96;

---

## 🔄 Development Workflow

### Step-by-Step Process

1. **Read Phase Analysis**: Check &#96;rebuild-roadmap/02-phases/01-phase-XX-*.md&#96;
2. **Read Step Details**: Follow implementation steps in phase doc
3. **Implement**: Code the feature
4. **Test**: Test on all platforms (Mobile, Desktop, Web)
5. **Update Changelog**: Mark step complete in &#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&#96;
6. **Commit**: Commit with descriptive message
7. **Move to Next Step**: Continue to next step in phase

### Testing Strategy

**All Platforms Simultaneously**:
- Test on Mobile (iOS/Android)
- Test on Desktop (macOS/Windows/Linux)
- Test on Web (Chrome-first)

**Quality Standards**:
- 60fps animations
- &lt; 100ms touch/click response
- WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility
- UI consistency across platforms

---

## 📝 Next Steps

### Immediate Next Task

**Phase 1 - Step 1.1**: Initialize All Platform Projects

**Tasks**:
1. Create monorepo structure
2. Initialize Mobile project (React Native + Expo)
3. Initialize Desktop project (Tauri)
4. Verify Web project (Next.js)
5. Set up shared codebase structure
6. Configure workspace

**See**: &#96;rebuild-roadmap/02-phases/01-phase-01-project-foundation.md&#96; → Step 1.1

---

## 🎨 Design Principles

- **Voice-First**: Audio is primary, text/visual secondary
- **Three Content Types**: Affirmations, Meditations, Rituals (NOT interchangeable)
- **Conversation Over Forms**: All creation through dialogue
- **Practice is Free**: Unlimited replay, credits only for creation
- **User Autonomy**: No manipulation, easy exit

---

## 🔗 Important Links

- **Roadmap**: &#96;rebuild-roadmap/01-planning/01-roadmap.md&#96;
- **Changelog**: &#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&#96;
- **Schema Verification**: &#96;rebuild-roadmap/01-planning/02-schema-verification.md&#96;
- **Product Docs**: &#96;../../docs/internal/&#96; (main project)

---

## 💡 Tips

1. **Use Context7**: Query documentation when needed (see &#96;docs/04-reference/01-context7-usage.md&#96;)
2. **Follow .cursorrules**: All project context is in &#96;.cursorrules&#96;
3. **Update Changelog**: Track progress in &#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&#96;
4. **Test Simultaneously**: Test all platforms together
5. **Document Decisions**: Update docs as you go

---

**Ready to start?** Begin with **Phase 1 - Step 1.1**!

**Last Updated**: 2026-02-07

```
</details>
</tool-use>

---

---

## 1. **First-commits vs now**

- **`docs/04-reference/06-first-commits-vs-now.md`**

  - **Coherence checklist** (all items completed).

---

## 2. **Restored / created for coherence**

| Doc | Purpose |
|-----|--------|
| **docs/04-reference/03-start-here.md** | Replaces old root `START_HERE.md`: quick start, current phase, essential docs, workflow, design principles, links. Updated for current Node/scripts and changelog. |
| **docs/04-reference/02-context7-usage.md** | How to use Context7: when to use it, what to query (core + this repo), example queries. |
| **rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/02-analysis-template.md** | Template for phase analyses (Overview, NOW/AFTER, Schema, Steps, Verification, References). |
| **rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/03-step-tracking.md** | Template for tracking a single step (status, tasks, notes, changelog entry). |

---

## 3. **Link and reference fixes**

- **docs/01-core/README.md** – Context7 link updated from `../03-reference/01-context7-usage.md` to `../04-reference/02-context7-usage.md`.  
- **.cursorrules** – Context7 guide path updated from `01-context7-usage.md` to `02-context7-usage.md` (two places).  
- **docs/ORGANIZATION.md** – 04-reference section updated to list 01–06 (showcase, context7, start-here, pages, coverage, first-commits).  
- **docs/README.md** – Reference list and “How to Use” updated to include 02, 03, 06; tree updated; “Last updated” set to 2026-02-16.

---

## 4. **Current 04-reference layout**

- **01-showcase-access.md** – Component showcase.  
- **02-context7-usage.md** – Context7 usage (new).  
- **03-start-here.md** – Developer entry (replaces root START_HERE) (new).  
- **04-pages-comparison.md** – Pages SSOT.  
- **05-documentation-coverage-analysis.md** – Architecture, LLM, pipelines, marketplace.  
- **06-first-commits-vs-now.md** – First commits vs now and coherence (new).

Roadmap links to **02-analysis-template** and **03-step-tracking** now resolve. Documentation is aligned with the first-commits vs now analysis and the coherence checklist in **06-first-commits-vs-now.md**.

          }
        },
        "contents": "## Phase 5: Content Definitions &amp; Types\n\n### Step 5.1: Define Content Type System\n**Goal**: Implement the three content types with proper definitions\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Create TypeScript types for Affirmation, Meditation, Ritual\n- [ ] Define structure for each type (based on scientific foundations)\n- [ ] Create content type enums and constants\n- [ ] Add validation schemas (using Zod)\n- [ ] Document differences between types\n- [ ] Create content factory/helper functions\n\n**Deliverables**:\n- Type system for content\n- Validation schemas\n\n**Success Criteria**: Types are well-defined, validation works\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: No UI changes, but types are ready\n\n---\n\n### Step 5.2: Build Content Detail Screens (Empty)\n**Goal**: Create screens for viewing individual content items\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Create Affirmation detail screen (structure only)\n- [ ] Create Meditation detail screen (structure only)\n- [ ] Create Ritual detail screen (structure only)\n- [ ] Add placeholder for audio player\n- [ ] Add placeholder for content text\n- [ ] Add action buttons (Play, Edit, Delete, Share)\n- [ ] Add metadata display (duration, created date, tags)\n\n**Deliverables**:\n- Three detail screens with structure\n\n**Success Criteria**: Can navigate to detail screens, see structure\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: See detail screens with placeholders for all elements\n\n---\n\n### Step 5.3: Build Content Creation Flows (Structure Only)\n**Goal**: Create multi-step creation flows for each content type\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Create Affirmation creation flow (steps: Intent, Script, Voice, Review)\n- [ ] Create Meditation creation flow (steps: Intent, Context, Script, Voice, Review)\n- [ ] Create Ritual creation flow (steps: Intent, Context, Personalization, Script, Voice, Review)\n- [ ] Add step indicator component\n- [ ] Add navigation between steps\n- [ ] Add form inputs for each step (non-functional)\n- [ ] Add \"Next\" and \"Back\" buttons\n\n**Deliverables**:\n- Three creation flows with all steps\n\n**Success Criteria**: Can navigate through all steps in each flow\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: See multi-step creation flows, can navigate steps, see all form fields",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.cursorrules",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 929
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 982
          }
        },
        "contents": "2. **Implement on both platforms** - Mobile and Web simultaneously\n3. **Test frequently** - after each change on both platforms\n4. **Update changelog** - mark progress\n5. **Document decisions** - note why choices were made\n6. **Keep schemas coherent** - verify at each step\n7. **Ensure consistency** - UI/UX consistent across platforms\n\n### After Completing a Step\n\n1. **Verify UI checkpoint** - see visible progress on both platforms\n2. **Test functionality** - ensure it works on Mobile and Web\n3. **Verify consistency** - UI/UX consistent across platforms\n4. **Update changelog** - mark complete with date in &#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&#96;\n5. **Update docs** - if needed\n6. **Commit changes** - with descriptive message\n\n### When Re-Running a Step\n\n1. **Check changelog** - see what was done before in &#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&#96;\n2. **Update changelog** - add new entry with date\n3. **Note changes** - what was updated\n4. **Keep history** - don't delete previous entries\n5. **Test all platforms** - ensure changes work on all platforms\n\n---\n\n## Key Requirements\n\n### Voice-First Design\n- **Audio is primary** - text/visual are secondary\n- **Background audio** - support background playback\n- **Handle interruptions** - calls, notifications\n- **Voice recording** - high-quality capture\n\n### Three Content Types (NOT Interchangeable)\n- **Affirmations** - Cognitive re-patterning (shallow → medium)\n- **Guided Meditations** - State induction (medium)\n- **Rituals** - Identity encoding (deepest)\n\n**Reference**: Use Context7 to query &#96;../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md&#96;\n\n### Conversation Over Forms\n- **No static forms** - all creation through dialogue\n- **Chat-like interface** - conversational UI\n- **Context-aware** - adapts based on responses\n- **State machine** - manage conversation flow\n\n### Practice is Free\n- **Unlimited replay** - no credit consumption for playback\n- **Credits for creation** - only creation costs credits\n- **No subscription pressure** - user autonomy\n\n### User Autonomy",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "2. **Implement on both platforms** - Mobile and Web simultaneously",
            "lineNumber": 930
          },
          {
            "text": "3. **Test frequently** - after each change on both platforms",
            "lineNumber": 931
          },
          {
            "text": "4. **Update changelog** - mark progress",
            "lineNumber": 932
          },
          {
            "text": "5. **Document decisions** - note why choices were made",
            "lineNumber": 933
          },
          {
            "text": "6. **Keep schemas coherent** - verify at each step",
            "lineNumber": 934
          },
          {
            "text": "7. **Ensure consistency** - UI/UX consistent across platforms",
            "lineNumber": 935
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 936
          },
          {
            "text": "### After Completing a Step",
            "lineNumber": 937
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 938
          },
          {
            "text": "1. **Verify UI checkpoint** - see visible progress on both platforms",
            "lineNumber": 939
          },
          {
            "text": "2. **Test functionality** - ensure it works on Mobile and Web",
            "lineNumber": 940
          },
          {
            "text": "3. **Verify consistency** - UI/UX consistent across platforms",
            "lineNumber": 941
          },
          {
            "text": "4. **Update changelog** - mark complete with date in &#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 942
          },
          {
            "text": "5. **Update docs** - if needed",
            "lineNumber": 943
          },
          {
            "text": "6. **Commit changes** - with descriptive message",
            "lineNumber": 944
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 945
          },
          {
            "text": "### When Re-Running a Step",
            "lineNumber": 946
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 947
          },
          {
            "text": "1. **Check changelog** - see what was done before in &#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 948
          },
          {
            "text": "2. **Update changelog** - add new entry with date",
            "lineNumber": 949
          },
          {
            "text": "3. **Note changes** - what was updated",
            "lineNumber": 950
          },
          {
            "text": "4. **Keep history** - don't delete previous entries",
            "lineNumber": 951
          },
          {
            "text": "5. **Test all platforms** - ensure changes work on all platforms",
            "lineNumber": 952
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 953
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 954
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 955
          },
          {
            "text": "## Key Requirements",
            "lineNumber": 956
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 957
          },
          {
            "text": "### Voice-First Design",
            "lineNumber": 958
          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./rebuild-roadmap/02-phases/09-phase-09-ai-integration.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 68
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 146
          }
        },
        "contents": "|------------|------|--------|-------|\n| content_items.script | Field | ✅ | Populated by AI |\n| content_items.audio_url | Field | ✅ | Populated by TTS |\n\n### Schema Changes Required\n- None (using existing fields)\n\n---\n\n## Implementation Steps\n\n### Step 9.1: Set Up OpenAI Integration\n**Goal**: Connect to OpenAI API for content generation\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Set up OpenAI client\n- [ ] Create API route/function for script generation\n- [ ] Create prompts for each content type (Affirmation, Meditation, Ritual)\n- [ ] Add prompt engineering based on scientific foundations\n- [ ] Add error handling for API failures\n- [ ] Add rate limiting\n- [ ] Add cost tracking\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: Can generate scripts, see them in creation flows\n\n---\n\n### Step 9.2: Integrate OpenAI TTS\n**Goal**: Generate audio from text using OpenAI TTS\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Set up OpenAI TTS API calls\n- [ ] Create TTS generation function\n- [ ] Add voice selection (alloy, echo, fable, onyx, nova, shimmer)\n- [ ] Add SSML support for prosody control\n- [ ] Add audio format selection (mp3, opus)\n- [ ] Store generated audio in Supabase Storage\n- [ ] Add progress tracking for generation\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: Can generate audio, hear it play, see it stored\n\n---\n\n### Step 9.3: Implement Conversation Flow\n**Goal**: Create conversational content creation\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Design conversation UI (chat-like interface)\n- [ ] Create conversation state machine\n- [ ] Implement conversation steps for each content type\n- [ ] Add context gathering through conversation\n- [ ] Add conversation history management\n- [ ] Add ability to go back and edit responses\n- [ ] Connect to OpenAI for conversational responses\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: See chat interface, have conversation, generate content\n\n---\n\n## Verification Checklist\n\n### AI Integration\n- [ ] OpenAI connection works\n- [ ] Script generation works\n- [ ] TTS generation works\n- [ ] Error handling works\n- [ ] Cost tracking works\n\n### Conversation Flow\n- [ ] Conversation UI works\n- [ ] State machine works\n- [ ] Context gathering works\n- [ ] Content generation works\n\n---\n\n## References",

        "contents": "# Phase 5: Content Definitions &amp; Types - Detailed Analysis\n\n## Overview\n**Goal**: Implement the three content types (Affirmations, Meditations, Rituals) with proper TypeScript definitions, validation schemas, and creation flow structures\n**Status**: ⏳ Pending → Ready to start after Phase 4\n**Dependencies**: Phase 4 (Core Pages Structure)\n\n## Changelog\n\n### 2026-02-07 - Initial Analysis Created\n- **Status**: 📝 Analysis Complete\n- **Notes**: Created detailed phase analysis with NOW/AFTER comparison and implementation steps\n- **Next**: Begin after Phase 4 completion\n\n---\n\n## Current State Analysis (NOW)\n\n### Current Implementation\n**Location**: Create screen exists but flows are empty\n\n**What Exists** (After Phase 4):\n- ✅ Create screen with three options\n- ✅ Navigation to creation flows\n- ❌ No content type definitions\n- ❌ No validation schemas\n- ❌ No creation flow structure\n\n**Current Schema**:\n- content_items table may exist but structure unclear\n\n**Current Features**:\n- Create Screen: ✅ Entry point exists\n- Content Types: ❌ Not defined\n- Validation: ❌ Not implemented\n- Creation Flows: ❌ Empty\n\n---\n\n## Target State (AFTER)\n\n### Target Implementation\n**New Location**: &#96;src/types/content.ts&#96;, &#96;src/schemas/content.ts&#96;, &#96;src/screens/create/&#96;\n\n**What Will Exist**:\n- ✅ TypeScript types for all three content types\n- ✅ Zod validation schemas\n- ✅ Content type enums and constants\n- ✅ Detail screens for each content type (structure)\n- ✅ Multi-step creation flows (structure)\n\n**Target Features**:\n- Type System: ✅ Complete definitions\n- Validation: ✅ Zod schemas\n- Detail Screens: ✅ Structure ready\n- Creation Flows: ✅ All steps defined\n\n---\n\n## Schema Verification\n\n### Current Schema (NOW)\n| Table/Field | Type | Status | Notes |\n|------------|------|--------|-------|\n| content_items | Table | ⏳ | Structure to verify |\n| content_type | Enum | ⏳ | Should be: affirmation, meditation, ritual |\n\n### Target Schema (AFTER)\n| Table/Field | Type | Status | Notes |\n|------------|------|--------|-------|\n| content_items | Table | ✅ | Verified structure |",

        "contents": "- Audio storage integration\n\n**Success Criteria**: Can upload and download audio files\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: Can upload recordings, download and play stored audio\n\n---\n\n## Phase 9: AI Integration\n\n### Step 9.1: Set Up OpenAI Integration\n**Goal**: Connect to OpenAI API for content generation\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Set up OpenAI client\n- [ ] Create API route/function for script generation\n- [ ] Create prompts for each content type (Affirmation, Meditation, Ritual)\n- [ ] Add prompt engineering based on scientific foundations\n- [ ] Add error handling for API failures\n- [ ] Add rate limiting\n- [ ] Add cost tracking\n\n**Deliverables**:\n- OpenAI integration ready\n\n**Success Criteria**: Can generate content using OpenAI\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: Can generate scripts, see them in creation flows\n\n---\n\n### Step 9.2: Integrate OpenAI TTS\n**Goal**: Generate audio from text using OpenAI TTS\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Set up OpenAI TTS API calls\n- [ ] Create TTS generation function\n- [ ] Add voice selection (alloy, echo, fable, onyx, nova, shimmer)\n- [ ] Add SSML support for prosody control\n- [ ] Add audio format selection (mp3, opus)\n- [ ] Store generated audio in Supabase Storage\n- [ ] Add progress tracking for generation\n\n**Deliverables**:\n- TTS integration working\n\n**Success Criteria**: Can generate audio from text\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: Can generate audio, hear it play, see it stored\n\n---\n\n### Step 9.3: Implement Conversation Flow\n**Goal**: Create conversational content creation\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Design conversation UI (chat-like interface)\n- [ ] Create conversation state machine\n- [ ] Implement conversation steps for each content type\n- [ ] Add context gathering through conversation\n- [ ] Add conversation history management\n- [ ] Add ability to go back and edit responses\n- [ ] Connect to OpenAI for conversational responses\n\n**Deliverables**:\n- Conversational creation flow\n\n**Success Criteria**: Can create content through conversation\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: See chat interface, have conversation, generate content\n\n---\n\n## Phase 10: Payment &amp; Credits\n\n### Step 10.1: Integrate Stripe",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./rebuild-roadmap/02-phases/09-phase-09-ai-integration.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 72
          }
        },
        "contents": "# Phase 9: AI Integration - Detailed Analysis\n\n## Overview\n**Goal**: Integrate OpenAI for content generation (scripts and TTS) and implement conversational content creation flow\n**Status**: ⏳ Pending → Ready to start after Phase 8\n**Dependencies**: Phase 8 (Audio System)\n\n## Changelog\n\n### 2026-02-07 - Initial Analysis Created\n- **Status**: 📝 Analysis Complete\n- **Notes**: Created detailed phase analysis with NOW/AFTER comparison and implementation steps\n- **Next**: Begin after Phase 8 completion\n\n---\n\n## Current State Analysis (NOW)\n\n### Current Implementation\n**Location**: Creation flows exist but are non-functional\n\n**What Exists** (After Phases 1-8):\n- ✅ Creation flow structures\n- ✅ Form inputs\n- ✅ Audio system ready\n- ❌ No AI integration\n- ❌ No script generation\n- ❌ No TTS generation\n- ❌ No conversational flow\n\n**Current Features**:\n- Creation Flows: ✅ Structure exists\n- AI Integration: ❌ Not implemented\n- Script Generation: ❌ Not implemented\n- TTS: ❌ Not implemented\n\n---\n\n## Target State (AFTER)\n\n### Target Implementation\n**New Location**: &#96;src/services/ai/&#96;, &#96;src/hooks/useAI.ts&#96;, &#96;src/screens/create/conversation/&#96;\n\n**What Will Exist**:\n- ✅ OpenAI integration for script generation\n- ✅ OpenAI TTS integration\n- ✅ Conversational creation flow\n- ✅ Prompt engineering based on scientific foundations\n- ✅ Cost optimization (GPT-4o-mini, Batch API)\n\n**Target Features**:\n- Script Generation: ✅ Working for all content types\n- TTS: ✅ Audio generation from text\n- Conversation: ✅ Chat-like creation flow\n- Cost Optimization: ✅ Implemented\n\n---\n\n## Schema Verification\n\n### Current Schema (NOW)\n| Table/Field | Type | Status | Notes |\n|------------|------|--------|-------|\n| content_items.script | Field | ✅ | Should exist |\n| content_items.audio_url | Field | ✅ | Should exist |\n\n### Target Schema (AFTER)\n| Table/Field | Type | Status | Notes |\n|------------|------|--------|-------|\n| content_items.script | Field | ✅ | Populated by AI |\n| content_items.audio_url | Field | ✅ | Populated by TTS |",
        "signatures": {},

      "codeBlock": {

        "contents": "const CONTENT_TYPES: ContentType[] = [\n  {\n    name: 'Create Affirmation',\n    description: 'Powerful statements to rewire your subconscious mind',\n    icon: Sparkles,\n    href: '/sanctuary/affirmations/create',\n    color: 'primary',\n  },\n  {\n    name: 'Create Meditation',\n    description: 'Guided meditations for deep relaxation and transformation',\n    icon: Brain,\n    href: '/sanctuary/meditations/create',\n    color: 'secondary',\n  },\n  {\n    name: 'Create Ritual',\n    description: 'Personalized rituals combining voice, frequencies, and intention',\n    icon: Music,\n    href: '/sanctuary/rituals/create',\n    color: 'tertiary',\n  },\n];\n\nexport default function CreatePage() {\n  const { theme } = useTheme();\n  const colors = theme.colors;\n\n  return (\n    &lt;PageShell intensity=\"medium\"&gt;\n      &lt;div style={{ maxWidth: '1400px', margin: '0 auto' }}&gt;\n          {/* Header */}\n          &lt;div style={{ marginBottom: spacing.xl }}&gt;\n            &lt;Typography variant=\"h1\" style={{ marginBottom: spacing.sm, color: colors.text.primary }}&gt;\n              Create New Content\n            &lt;/Typography&gt;\n}",
        "signatures": {},

None (structure only, no data yet)\n\n---\n\n## Implementation Steps\n\n### Step 4.1: Build Home/Sanctuary Screen\n**Goal**: Create main dashboard screen with empty state\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Design home screen layout\n- [ ] Add header with user greeting\n- [ ] Add empty state for no content\n- [ ] Add quick action buttons (Create Affirmation, Create Meditation, Create Ritual)\n- [ ] Add navigation to other sections\n- [ ] Add placeholder for stats\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: See home screen with empty states and action buttons\n\n---\n\n### Step 4.2: Build Library Screen\n**Goal**: Create content library screen (empty)\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Design library screen layout\n- [ ] Add filter tabs (All, Affirmations, Meditations, Rituals)\n- [ ] Add search bar (non-functional for now)\n- [ ] Add empty state with illustration\n- [ ] Add grid/list view toggle (placeholder)\n- [ ] Add sorting options (placeholder)\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: See library screen with filters and empty state\n\n---\n\n### Step 4.3: Build Create Screen\n**Goal**: Create content creation entry point\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Design create screen with three options\n- [ ] Add cards for: Create Affirmation, Create Meditation, Create Ritual\n- [ ] Add descriptions for each type\n- [ ] Add navigation to creation flows (empty flows for now)\n- [ ] Add visual indicators (icons, colors)\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: See create screen with three beautiful option cards\n\n---\n\n### Step 4.4: Build Profile/Settings Screen\n**Goal**: Create user profile and settings screen\n\n**Tasks**:\n- [ ] Design profile screen layout\n- [ ] Add user info section (name, email, avatar placeholder)\n- [ ] Add settings list (Preferences, Notifications, Credits, About, Logout)\n- [ ] Add navigation to each setting section\n- [ ] Add logout functionality\n- [ ] Add app version display\n\n**UI Checkpoint**: See profile screen with settings list, logout works\n\n---\n\n## Verification Checklist\n\n### Code Quality",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.cursorrules",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 863
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 931
          }
        },
        "contents": "3. **Are types shared?** → Import from shared\n4. **Is error handling proper?** → Add error handling\n5. **Are loading states handled?** → Add loading states\n6. **Is this production-ready?** → Review against standards\n\n---\n\n## Quick Reference\n\n### ✅ DO\n- Put business logic in &#96;packages/shared/&#96;\n- Import types from shared\n- Use shared services for API calls\n- Use shared stores for state\n- Use shared schemas for validation\n- Follow consistent architecture\n- Test on all platforms\n- Update changelog\n\n### ❌ DON'T\n- Duplicate code across platforms\n- Create types in platform folders\n- Create API services in platform folders\n- Create stores in platform folders\n- Create validation schemas in platform folders\n- Skip error handling\n- Skip loading states\n- Skip empty states\n- Commit without testing\n\n---\n\n## Database &amp; Schema\n\n### Current Schema\n- **Same database as web app** - Supabase PostgreSQL\n- **Reference**: &#96;rebuild-roadmap/01-planning/02-schema-verification.md&#96;\n\n### Missing Tables (To Be Created)\n- &#96;content_items&#96; - Unified table for affirmations/meditations/rituals\n- &#96;credit_transactions&#96; - Credit system tracking\n- &#96;conversations&#96; - Conversational creation flow\n\n### Schema Changes\n- **Always verify schemas** - check coherence\n- **Create migrations** - for schema changes\n- **Update docs** - document schema changes\n- **Test RLS policies** - verify security\n\n---\n\n## Implementation Workflow\n\n### Before Starting a Step\n\n1. **Read phase analysis** - &#96;rebuild-roadmap/02-phases/01-phase-XX-*.md&#96;\n2. **Check changelog** - &#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&#96;\n3. **Use Context7** - query relevant documentation\n4. **Review docs** - understand requirements\n5. **Understand NOW state** - current implementation\n6. **Plan AFTER state** - target implementation\n7. **Check multi-platform strategy** - &#96;docs/03-platforms/01-multi-platform-strategy.md&#96;\n\n### During Implementation\n\n1. **Follow step-by-step** - don't skip steps\n2. **Implement on both platforms** - Mobile and Web simultaneously\n3. **Test frequently** - after each change on both platforms",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "3. **Are types shared?** → Import from shared",
            "lineNumber": 864
          },
          {
            "text": "4. **Is error handling proper?** → Add error handling",
            "lineNumber": 865
          },
          {
            "text": "5. **Are loading states handled?** → Add loading states",
            "lineNumber": 866
          },
          {
            "text": "6. **Is this production-ready?** → Review against standards",
            "lineNumber": 867
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 868
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 869
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 870
          },
          {
            "text": "## Quick Reference",
            "lineNumber": 871
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 872
          },
          {
            "text": "### ✅ DO",
            "lineNumber": 873
          },
          {
            "text": "- Put business logic in &#96;packages/shared/&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 874
          },
          {
            "text": "- Import types from shared",
            "lineNumber": 875
          },
          {
            "text": "- Use shared services for API calls",
            "lineNumber": 876
          },
          {
            "text": "- Use shared stores for state",
            "lineNumber": 877
          },
          {
            "text": "- Use shared schemas for validation",
            "lineNumber": 878
          },
          {
            "text": "- Follow consistent architecture",
            "lineNumber": 879
          },
          {
            "text": "- Test on all platforms",
            "lineNumber": 880
          },
          {
            "text": "- Update changelog",
            "lineNumber": 881
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 882
          },
          {
            "text": "### ❌ DON'T",
            "lineNumber": 883
          },
          {
            "text": "- Duplicate code across platforms",
            "lineNumber": 884
          },
          {
            "text": "- Create types in platform folders",
            "lineNumber": 885
          },
          {
            "text": "- Create API services in platform folders",
            "lineNumber": 886
          },
          {
            "text": "- Create stores in platform folders",
            "lineNumber": 887
          },
          {
            "text": "- Create validation schemas in platform folders",
            "lineNumber": 888
          },
          {
            "text": "- Skip error handling",
            "lineNumber": 889
          },
          {
            "text": "- Skip loading states",
            "lineNumber": 890
          },
          {
            "text": "- Skip empty states",
            "lineNumber": 891
          },
          {
            "text": "- Commit without testing",
            "lineNumber": 892
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 893
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 894
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 895
          },
          {
            "text": "## Database &amp; Schema",
            "lineNumber": 896
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 897
          },
          {
            "text": "### Current Schema",
            "lineNumber": 898
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Same database as web app** - Supabase PostgreSQL",
            "lineNumber": 899
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Reference**: &#96;rebuild-roadmap/01-planning/02-schema-verification.md&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 900
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 901
          },
          {
            "text": "### Missing Tables (To Be Created)",
            "lineNumber": 902
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;content_items&#96; - Unified table for affirmations/meditations/rituals",
            "lineNumber": 903
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;credit_transactions&#96; - Credit system tracking",
            "lineNumber": 904
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;conversations&#96; - Conversational creation flow",
            "lineNumber": 905
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 906
          },
          {
            "text": "### Schema Changes",
            "lineNumber": 907
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Always verify schemas** - check coherence",
            "lineNumber": 908
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Create migrations** - for schema changes",
            "lineNumber": 909
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Update docs** - document schema changes",
            "lineNumber": 910
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Test RLS policies** - verify security",
            "lineNumber": 911
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 912
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 913
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 914
          },
          {
            "text": "## Implementation Workflow",
            "lineNumber": 915
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 916
          },
          {
            "text": "### Before Starting a Step",
            "lineNumber": 917
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 918
          },
          {
            "text": "1. **Read phase analysis** - &#96;rebuild-roadmap/02-phases/01-phase-XX-*.md&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 919
          },
          {
            "text": "2. **Check changelog** - &#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 920
          },
          {
            "text": "3. **Use Context7** - query relevant documentation",
            "lineNumber": 921
          },
          {
            "text": "4. **Review docs** - understand requirements",
            "lineNumber": 922
          },
          {
            "text": "5. **Understand NOW state** - current implementation",
            "lineNumber": 923
          },
          {
            "text": "6. **Plan AFTER state** - target implementation",
            "lineNumber": 924
          },
          {
            "text": "7. **Check multi-platform strategy** - &#96;docs/03-platforms/01-multi-platform-strategy.md&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 925
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 926
          },
          {
            "text": "### During Implementation",
            "lineNumber": 927
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 928
          },
          {
            "text": "1. **Follow step-by-step** - don't skip steps",
            "lineNumber": 929
          },
          {
            "text": "2. **Implement on both platforms** - Mobile and Web simultaneously",
            "lineNumber": 930
          },
          {
            "text": "3. **Test frequently** - after each change on both platforms",
            "lineNumber": 931
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.27279528975486755
    },

        "contents": "'use client';\n\nimport React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';\nimport { Typography, Button } from '@/components';\nimport { useTheme } from '@/theme';\nimport { PageShell } from '@/components';\nimport { spacing, borderRadius } from '@/theme';\nimport Link from 'next/link';\nimport {\n  Sunrise,\n  Bell,\n  Brain,\n  Zap,\n  Heart,\n  Music,\n  Clock,\n  Download,\n  Star,\n  Users,\n  Sparkles,\n  ArrowRight,\n  Check,\n} from 'lucide-react';\n\nconst steps = [\n  {\n    icon: Sunrise,\n    title: 'Morning Ritual',\n    description: 'Start your day with intention',\n    detail: 'Begin each morning with a personalized combination of meditation and powerful affirmations, designed to align with your energy and goals.',\n    highlight: 'AI-powered personalization adapts to your preferences',\n  },\n  {\n    icon: Bell,\n    title: 'Daily Reminders',\n    description: 'Stay consistent with gentle nudges',\n    detail: 'Receive thoughtful notifications at your preferred times, helping you maintain your practice and build lasting habits.',\n    highlight: 'Smart scheduling based on your most successful sessions',\n  },\n  {\n    icon: Brain,\n    title: 'Sacred Guide',\n    description: 'Your personal spiritual companion',\n    detail: 'Let our intelligent system guide your growth with personalized recommendations for meditations, affirmations, and practices.',\n    highlight: 'Learns and evolves with your spiritual journey',\n  },\n  {\n    icon: Zap,\n    title: 'Track Your Growth',\n    description: 'Visualize your transformation',\n    detail: 'Monitor your progress with beautiful insights, celebrate streaks, and unlock achievements as you deepen your practice.',\n    highlight: 'Watch your consistency build lasting change',\n  },\n];\n\nconst benefits = [\n  {\n    icon: Heart,\n    title: 'Personalized Experience',\n,\n];",
