{
  "plan": "# All Pages Frontend Implementation\n\nReplace every stub/placeholder page with production-ready frontend UI. Use mock data; no backend integration. Update docs as we go. Use Context7 to query [docs/01-core/](docs/01-core/), [docs/04-reference/](docs/04-reference/), and [rebuild-roadmap/](rebuild-roadmap/) for pipeline and page specs.\n\n---\n\n## Architecture\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\nflowchart TB\n    subgraph shared [Shared Components]\n        ContentListPage[ContentListPage]\n        ContentDetailPage[ContentDetailPage]\n        AudioPageShared[AudioPage]\n    end\n\n    subgraph lists [List Pages]\n        A[sanctuary/affirmations]\n        R[sanctuary/rituals]\n        M[sanctuary/meditations]\n    end\n\n    subgraph details [Detail Pages]\n        AD[affirmations/[id]]\n        RD[rituals/[id]]\n        MD[meditations/[id]]\n    end\n\n    subgraph edits [Edit + Audio]\n        AE[edit]\n        AEA[edit-audio]\n    end\n\n    ContentListPage --&gt; A\n    ContentListPage --&gt; R\n    ContentListPage --&gt; M\n    ContentDetailPage --&gt; AD\n    ContentDetailPage --&gt; RD\n    ContentDetailPage --&gt; MD\n    AudioPageShared --&gt; AEA\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n---\n\n## Phase 1: Shared Components\n\n### 1.1 ContentListPage (or inline pattern)\n- **Location**: &#96;src/components/content/ContentListPage.tsx&#96; or reuse Library pattern inline\n- **Props**: &#96;title&#96;, &#96;description&#96;, &#96;contentType&#96; ('affirmation'|'ritual'|'meditation'), &#96;createHref&#96;, &#96;listHref&#96;\n- **UI**: Header (title, description), Create button, search input, filter chips (if multiple types), grid of cards (from Library pattern), empty state with CTA\n- **Data**: Mock &#96;ContentItem[]&#96; with &#96;id&#96;, &#96;type&#96;, &#96;title&#96;, &#96;description&#96;, &#96;duration&#96;, &#96;frequency?&#96;, &#96;lastPlayed?&#96;\n- **Cards**: Link to detail page by type: &#96;/sanctuary/affirmations/[id]&#96;, &#96;/sanctuary/rituals/[id]&#96;, &#96;/sanctuary/meditations/[id]&#96;\n\n### 1.2 ContentDetailPage\n- **Location**: &#96;src/components/content/ContentDetailPage.tsx&#96;\n- **Props**: &#96;id&#96;, &#96;contentType&#96;, &#96;title&#96;, &#96;description&#96;, &#96;duration?&#96;, &#96;script?&#96;, &#96;backHref&#96;\n- **UI**: Back link, title, description; &#96;SpeakingAnimation&#96; (idle or &#96;isSpeaking&#96; when playing); Play / Edit / Delete / Share buttons; metadata (duration, last played); script preview (collapsible)\n- **Links**: Edit → &#96;[id]/edit&#96;; Edit audio → &#96;[id]/edit-audio&#96;\n\n### 1.3 AudioPage (edit-audio)\n- **Location**: &#96;src/components/audio/AudioPage.tsx&#96;\n- **Spec**: [docs/01-core/06-audio-generation-summary.md](docs/01-core/06-audio-generation-summary.md)\n- **UI**: Volume sliders (voice, ambient, master); waveform viz (bars/line/particles - reuse SpeakingAnimation bars); preview play/pause/seek; back/save buttons\n- **Props**: &#96;id&#96;, &#96;contentType&#96;, &#96;backHref&#96;, &#96;onSave?&#96; (no-op for now)\n\n---\n\n## Phase 2: List Pages\n\nReplace &#96;PlaceholderPage&#96; with full UI in:\n\n| Page | File | Content type |\n|------|------|-------------|\n| Affirmations list | [sanctuary/affirmations/page.tsx](packages/web/app/sanctuary/affirmations/page.tsx) | affirmation |\n| Rituals list | [sanctuary/rituals/page.tsx](packages/web/app/sanctuary/rituals/page.tsx) | ritual |\n| Meditations list | [sanctuary/meditations/page.tsx](packages/web/app/sanctuary/meditations/page.tsx) | meditation |\n\n- Use ContentListPage or copy Library grid pattern; filter to single type\n- Create href: &#96;/sanctuary/{type}/create&#96;\n\n---\n\n## Phase 3: Detail Pages\n\nReplace &#96;PlaceholderPage&#96; in:\n\n| Page | File |\n|------|------|\n| Affirmation detail | [sanctuary/affirmations/[id]/page.tsx](packages/web/app/sanctuary/affirmations/[id]/page.tsx) |\n| Ritual detail | [sanctuary/rituals/[id]/page.tsx](packages/web/app/sanctuary/rituals/[id]/page.tsx) |\n| Meditation detail | [sanctuary/meditations/[id]/page.tsx](packages/web/app/sanctuary/meditations/[id]/page.tsx) |\n\n- Use &#96;ContentDetailPage&#96; with mock data keyed by &#96;id&#96;\n- Play: toggle &#96;isSpeaking&#96; on SpeakingAnimation (no real audio yet)\n- Delete: confirm dialog, redirect to list (no persistence)\n- Share: copy link or placeholder toast\n\n---\n\n## Phase 4: Edit Pages\n\n| Page | File |\n|------|------|\n| Affirmation edit | [sanctuary/affirmations/[id]/edit/page.tsx](packages/web/app/sanctuary/affirmations/[id]/edit/page.tsx) |\n| Ritual edit | [sanctuary/rituals/[id]/edit/page.tsx](packages/web/app/sanctuary/rituals/[id]/edit/page.tsx) |\n| Meditation edit | [sanctuary/meditations/[id]/edit/page.tsx](packages/web/app/sanctuary/meditations/[id]/edit/page.tsx) |\n\n- Form: title, description, script (textarea)\n- Use &#96;Button&#96;, &#96;Typography&#96;, theme; PageShell, back to detail\n- Save: no-op or toast \"Saved\" (no backend)\n\n---\n\n## Phase 5: Audio Page (edit-audio)\n\nReplace stubs in:\n\n| Page | File |\n|------|------|\n| Affirmation edit-audio | [sanctuary/affirmations/[id]/edit-audio/page.tsx](packages/web/app/sanctuary/affirmations/[id]/edit-audio/page.tsx) |\n| Ritual edit-audio | [sanctuary/rituals/[id]/edit-audio/page.tsx](packages/web/app/sanctuary/rituals/[id]/edit-audio/page.tsx) |\n| Meditation edit-audio | [sanctuary/meditations/[id]/edit-audio/page.tsx](packages/web/app/sanctuary/meditations/[id]/edit-audio/page.tsx) |\n\n- Use shared &#96;AudioPage&#96; component\n- Sliders, waveform (SpeakingAnimation or custom bars), preview placeholder\n- Back to detail; Save button (no-op)\n\n---\n\n## Phase 6: Voice &amp; Conversation Pages\n\n### 6.1 Speak ([speak/page.tsx](packages/web/app/(main)/speak/page.tsx))\n- Full view with &#96;SpeakingAnimation&#96; (centered orb)\n- Mic button; \"Listening...\" / \"Speaking...\" states\n- Subtitle: \"Voice-first conversation — tap to speak\"\n- Link to /create/conversation\n\n### 6.2 Create Conversation ([create/conversation/page.tsx](packages/web/app/(main)/create/conversation/page.tsx))\n- Chat-like UI: message list (user/assistant bubbles)\n- Input at bottom; placeholder messages\n- Back to /create; \"Choose type\" (affirmation/meditation/ritual) chips\n- No real API; mock responses\n\n---\n\n## Phase 7: Marketplace Pages\n\n### 7.1 Marketplace ([marketplace/page.tsx](packages/web/app/(main)/marketplace/page.tsx))\n- Header, search bar, filter chips (All, Affirmations, Meditations, Rituals)\n- Grid of discovery cards (mock items with title, creator, rating)\n- Link to creator dashboard\n\n### 7.2 Marketplace Creator ([marketplace/creator/page.tsx](packages/web/app/(main)/marketplace/creator/page.tsx))\n- Dashboard: tabs or sections (Published, Drafts, Analytics placeholder)\n- Empty state + \"Publish content\" CTA\n- Link back to marketplace\n\n---\n\n## Phase 8: Library &amp; Navigation\n\n### 8.1 Library\n- [library/page.tsx](packages/web/app/(main)/library/page.tsx): Wrap each content card in &#96;Link&#96; to appropriate detail route by type\n- Ensure cards navigate to &#96;/sanctuary/affirmations/[id]&#96;, &#96;/sanctuary/rituals/[id]&#96;, &#96;/sanctuary/meditations/[id]&#96;\n\n### 8.2 Create page\n- Optional: Add \"Or speak to create\" link to /create/conversation or /speak\n\n---\n\n## Phase 9: Docs &amp; /pages Index\n\n### 9.1 [04-pages-comparison.md](docs/04-reference/04-pages-comparison.md)\n- Update Affirmations, Rituals, Meditations tables: change \"Missing\" to \"Exists (full UI)\" for detail, edit, edit-audio\n- Update Voice &amp; conversation: \"Exists (full UI)\" for /speak, /create/conversation\n- Update Marketplace: \"Exists (full UI)\" for /marketplace, /marketplace/creator\n- Update Summary table\n\n### 9.2 [pages/page.tsx](packages/web/app/pages/page.tsx)\n- Remove \"Stub\" notes from all routes\n- Set status to &#96;exists&#96; for all; optional &#96;note: 'Full UI'&#96; where relevant\n- Ensure all routes (including edit, edit-audio, conversation, speak, marketplace) are listed\n\n### 9.3 Sitemap\n- [sitemap.ts](packages/web/app/sitemap.ts): Dynamic [id] routes are typically omitted (user-specific). Verify static routes; add any missing (e.g. /sanctuary/affirmations/[id]/edit if we want crawlable URLs - optional).\n- Current static list is sufficient; no change unless we add new top-level routes.\n\n### 9.4 ORGANIZATION.md, README\n- No structural changes; only update \"Last updated\" if we add new doc files.\n\n---\n\n## Key Files to Reference\n\n- [docs/01-core/06-audio-generation-summary.md](docs/01-core/06-audio-generation-summary.md) — Audio page spec\n- [docs/01-core/02-pipeline-affirmations.md](docs/01-core/02-pipeline-affirmations.md) — Affirmation flow\n- [docs/04-reference/04-pages-comparison.md](docs/04-reference/04-pages-comparison.md) — Page SSOT\n- [packages/web/app/(main)/library/page.tsx](packages/web/app/(main)/library/page.tsx) — Card/filter pattern\n- [packages/web/src/components/audio/SpeakingAnimation.tsx](packages/web/src/components/audio/SpeakingAnimation.tsx) — Orb + frequency bars\n\n---\n\n## Context7 Queries (during implementation)\n\n- \"What controls and UX goals does the Audio page have?\" → &#96;docs/01-core/06-audio-generation-summary.md&#96;\n- \"What does the affirmation pipeline include?\" → &#96;docs/01-core/02-pipeline-affirmations.md&#96;\n- \"What pages are missing vs existing?\" → &#96;docs/04-reference/04-pages-comparison.md&#96;",
  "name": "All Pages Frontend Implementation",
  "overview": "Replace all placeholder/stub pages with full frontend UI, create shared components where appropriate, and update documentation (04-pages-comparison, ORGANIZATION, /pages index) to reflect the complete route inventory."
}

Implementation is complete. Summary:

## Implementation Summary

### Phase 1: Shared components
- **`ContentItem.ts`** – Types for content items
- **`getContentDetailHref.ts`** – Maps content type + id to detail URLs
- **`ContentListPage.tsx`** – Reusable list with header, search, cards grid, empty state
- **`ContentDetailPage.tsx`** – Detail view with SpeakingAnimation, Play/Edit/Delete/Share
- **`ContentEditPage.tsx`** – Edit form (title, description, script)
- **`AudioPage.tsx`** – Audio edit page with volume sliders (voice, ambient, master), waveform, preview
- **`mockContent.ts`** – Mock content by type

### Phase 2: List pages
- Affirmations, rituals, meditations – use `ContentListPage` with mock data

### Phase 3: Detail pages
- Affirmations, rituals, meditations `[id]` – use `ContentDetailPage` and mock data

### Phase 4: Edit pages
- Affirmations, rituals, meditations `[id]/edit` – use `ContentEditPage`

### Phase 5: Audio pages (edit-audio)
- Affirmations, rituals, meditations `[id]/edit-audio` – use shared `AudioPage`

### Phase 6: Voice & conversation
- **`/speak`** – Orb (SpeakingAnimation), mic button, Listening/Speaking states, link to conversation
- **`/create/conversation`** – Chat UI, type chips, mock responses

### Phase 7: Marketplace
- **`/marketplace`** – Discovery grid, filters, search, mock items
- **`/marketplace/creator`** – Tabs (Published, Drafts, Analytics), empty state

### Phase 8: Library & navigation
- Library cards wrapped in `Link` to correct detail routes by type
- Create page: “Or speak to create” and “Voice mode” links

### Phase 9: Docs
- **`04-pages-comparison.md`** – All entries updated to “Exists (full UI)” where appropriate
- **`pages/page.tsx`** – Stub notes removed; routes marked as `exists`

Type-check passes. The build failure is from sandbox restrictions (port binding) and is not caused by these code changes.

---
